33818.title: The Effects of Political Advertising on Facebook and Instagram before the 2020 US Election
33818.zh_title: 2020年美国大选前Facebook和Instagram上政治广告的影响
33818.authors: Hunt Allcott, Matthew Gentzkow, Ro’ee Levy, Adriana Crespo-Tenorio, Natasha Dumas, Winter Mason, Devra Moehler, Pablo Barbera, Taylor W. Brown, Juan Carlos Cisneros, Drew Dimmery, Deen Freelon, Sandra González-Bailón, Andrew M. Guess, Young Mie Kim, David Lazer, Neil Malhotra, Sameer Nair-Desai, Brendan Nyhan, Ana Carolina Paixao de Queiroz, Jennifer Pan, Jaime Settle, Emily Thorson, Rebekah Tromble, Carlos Velasco Rivera, Benjamin Wittenbrink, Magdalena Wojcieszak, Shiqi Yang, Saam Zahedian, Annie Franco, Chad Kiewiet de Jonge, Natalie Jomini Stroud, Joshua A. Tucker
33818.abstract: We study the effects of social media political advertising by randomizing subsets of 36,906 Facebook users and 25,925 Instagram users to have political ads removed from their news feeds for six weeks before the 2020 US presidential election. We show that most presidential ads were targeted toward parties’ own supporters and that fundraising ads were most common. On both Facebook and Instagram, we found no detectable effects of removing political ads on political knowledge, polarization, perceived legitimacy of the election, political participation (including campaign contributions), candidate favorability, and turnout. This was true overall and for both Democrats and Republicans separately.
33818.zh_abstract: 我们通过随机将36,906名Facebook用户和25,925名Instagram用户的子集设置为在2020年美国总统大选前六周内从其信息流中移除政治广告，来研究社交媒体政治广告的影响。我们发现，大多数总统广告都针对政党自己的支持者，且筹款广告最为常见。在Facebook和Instagram上，我们均未发现移除政治广告对政治知识、两极分化、选举合法性认知、政治参与（包括竞选捐款）、候选人好感度和投票率有可检测的影响。总体而言如此，分别对民主党和共和党而言也是如此。

33817.title: The Experimental Selection Correction Estimator: Using Experiments to Remove Biases in Observational Estimates
33817.zh_title: 实验性选择偏差校正估计量：利用实验消除观测估计中的偏差
33817.authors: Susan Athey, Raj Chetty, Guido Imbens
33817.abstract: Researchers increasingly have access to two types of data: (i) large observational datasets where treatment (e.g., class size) is not randomized but several primary outcomes (e.g., graduation rates) and secondary outcomes (e.g., test scores) are observed and (ii) experimental data in which treatment is randomized but only secondary outcomes are observed. We develop a new method to estimate treatment effects on primary outcomes in such settings. We use the difference between the secondary outcome and its predicted value based on the experimental treatment effect to measure selection bias in the observational data. Controlling for this estimate of selection bias yields an unbiased estimate of the treatment effect on the primary outcome under a new assumption that we term "latent unconfoundedness," which requires that the same confounders affect the primary and secondary outcomes. Latent unconfoundedness weakens the assumptions underlying commonly used surrogate estimators. We apply our estimator to identify the effect of third grade class size on students’ outcomes. Estimated impacts on test scores using OLS regressions in observational school district data have the opposite sign of estimates from the Tennessee STAR experiment. In contrast, selection-corrected estimates in the observational data replicate the experimental estimates. Our estimator reveals that reducing class sizes by 25% increases high school graduation rates by 0.7 percentage points. Controlling for observables does not change the OLS estimates, demonstrating that experimental selection correction can remove biases that cannot be addressed with standard controls.
33817.zh_abstract: 研究者越来越多地获得两类数据：(i) 大型观测数据集，其中处理（例如班级规模）并非随机分配，但观测到了几个主要结果（例如毕业率）和次要结果（例如考试成绩）；(ii) 实验数据，其中处理是随机分配的，但仅观测到了次要结果。我们开发了一种新方法来估计此类设定下对主要结果的处理效应。我们利用次要结果与其基于实验处理效应的预测值之间的差异来衡量观测数据中的选择偏差。控制这一选择偏差估计值，可以在我们称之为“潜在无混杂性”的新假设下，得到对主要结果处理效应的无偏估计。该假设要求相同的混杂因素同时影响主要和次要结果。潜在无混杂性弱化了常用替代估计量所依赖的假设。我们将我们的估计量应用于识别三年级班级规模对学生结果的影响。使用观测学区数据中的OLS回归估计出的对考试成绩的影响，与田纳西州STAR实验的估计符号相反。相比之下，观测数据中经选择校正的估计值复制了实验估计值。我们的估计量揭示，将班级规模减少25%可使高中毕业率提高0.7个百分点。控制可观测变量并未改变OLS估计值，这表明实验性选择校正可以消除标准控制变量无法解决的偏差。
33817.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C14, C21, C52, I26, J0

33816.title: Original Sin Redux: Role of Duration Risk
33816.zh_title: 原罪再探：期限风险的作用
33816.authors: Carol Bertaut, Valentina Bruno, Hyun Song Shin
33816.abstract: We highlight the role of duration and exchange rate risks on portfolio flows by using a unique and comprehensive database of US investor flows into emerging market government bonds denominated in local currency. Borrowing long-term mitigates roll-over risk but amplifies valuation changes that further interact with currency movements. Our analysis highlights the double-edged nature of long-term borrowing and draws attention to market stress dynamics due to strategic complementarities among mutual fund investors.
33816.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个独特且全面的美国投资者流入新兴市场本币计价政府债券的数据集，强调了期限和汇率风险对投资组合流动的作用。长期借款降低了展期风险，但放大了估值变化，这些变化进一步与货币波动相互作用。我们的分析凸显了长期借款的双刃剑性质，并提醒注意由于共同基金投资者之间的战略互补性而导致的市场压力动态。

33815.title: A Simplified Quest for Knowledge
33815.abstract: This paper develops a transparent, simplified version of Carnehl and Schneider (2025)’s model of knowledge creation. Our tractable framework, which yields closedform solutions for key welfare trade-offs, preserves the essential economic mechanisms while eliminating mathematical complexity. We derive four main insights. First, contrary to the original model’s emphasis on “moonshots,” our analysis explicitly demonstrates that expanding knowledge and then deepening it (the moonshot approach) is never socially optimal under direct welfare comparisons. The original model’s case for moonshots relies on second-best arguments involving research costs and dynamic externalities, not on direct welfare considerations. Second, we identify a novel misalignment between private and social incentives in multidisciplinary research contexts. Even without research costs—where the original model predicts perfect alignment—researchers bridging large knowledge gaps between disciplines choose locations that create suboptimal knowledge structures. Third, we analyse how citation-based incentive systems affect knowledge creation trajectories. We show that systems that privilege unique contributions over shared ones align private behaviour with social welfare objectives, while those that reward shared contributions lead to excessive knowledge deepening. Fourth, our analysis provides precise characterisations of optimal knowledge creation paths under various initial conditions and offers clear guidance for science policy. By clarifying when interventions can address misalignments between researchers’ incentives and social welfare, our simplified model offers practical insights for the design of research funding mechanisms.
33815.zh_abstract: 本文发展了Carnehl和Schneider（2025）知识创造模型的一个透明、简化版本。我们易于处理的框架得出了关键福利权衡的闭式解，在消除数学复杂性的同时保留了基本的经济机制。我们得出四个主要见解。首先，与原始模型强调“登月计划”相反，我们的分析明确表明，在直接福利比较下，先扩展知识再深化知识（登月方法）从来都不是社会最优的。原始模型支持登月计划的论点依赖于涉及研究成本和动态外部性的次优论证，而非直接福利考量。其次，我们在多学科研究背景下识别出私人激励与社会激励之间的一种新型错位。即使在没有研究成本的情况下——原始模型预测此时激励完全一致——弥合学科间较大知识差距的研究者会选择导致次优知识结构的位置。第三，我们分析了基于引用的激励系统如何影响知识创造轨迹。我们表明，优先考虑独特贡献而非共享贡献的系统使私人行为与社会福利目标一致，而奖励共享贡献的系统则导致过度的知识深化。第四，我们的分析提供了在各种初始条件下最优知识创造路径的精确刻画，并为科学政策提供了清晰指导。通过阐明干预措施何时可以解决研究者激励与社会福利之间的错位，我们的简化模型为研究资助机制的设计提供了实践见解。

33814.title: Decoding China's Industrial Policies
33814.authors: Hanming Fang, Ming Li, Guangli Lu
33814.abstract: We decode China’s industrial policies from 2000 to 2022 by employing large language models (LLMs) to extract and analyze rich information from a comprehensive dataset of 3 million documents issued by central, provincial, and municipal governments. Through careful prompt engineering, multistage extraction and refinement, and rigorous verification, we use LLMs to classify the industrial policy documents and extract structured information on policy objectives, targeted industries, policy tones (supportive or regulatory/suppressive), policy tools, implementation mechanisms, and intergovernmental relationships, etc. Combining these newly constructed industrial policy data with micro-level firm data, we document four sets of facts about China's industrial policy that explore the following questions: What are the economic and political foundations of the targeted industries? What policy tools are deployed? How do policy tools vary across different levels of government and regions, as well as over the phases of an industry's development? What are the impacts of these policies on firm behavior, including entry, production, and productivity growth? We also explore the political economy of industrial policy, focusing on top-down transmission mechanisms, policy persistence, and policy diffusion across regions. Finally, we document spatial inefficiencies and industry-wide overcapacity as potential downsides of industrial policies.
33814.zh_abstract: 我们通过运用大型语言模型（LLMs）从中央、省和市政府发布的300万份文件的综合数据集中提取和分析丰富信息，解码了2000年至2022年中国的产业政策。通过精心设计的提示工程、多阶段提取与精炼以及严格验证，我们使用LLMs对产业政策文件进行分类，并提取关于政策目标、目标行业、政策基调（支持性或监管/抑制性）、政策工具、实施机制以及政府间关系等的结构化信息。将这些新构建的产业政策数据与微观层面的企业数据相结合，我们记录了中国产业政策的四组事实，探讨了以下问题：目标行业的经济和政治基础是什么？部署了哪些政策工具？政策工具在不同政府层级和地区之间，以及在行业发展的不同阶段如何变化？这些政策对企业行为（包括进入、生产和生产率增长）有何影响？我们还探讨了产业政策的政治经济学，重点关注自上而下的传导机制、政策持续性以及政策在地区间的扩散。最后，我们记录了空间低效率和行业范围产能过剩作为产业政策的潜在弊端。
33814.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL, PR；JEL：C55, L52, O25

33813.title: The Evolution of Age-friendly Jobs in a Rapidly Ageing Economy
33813.zh_title: 快速老龄化经济中适龄友好型工作的演变
33813.authors: Hyeongsuk Kim, Chulhee Lee, Karen Eggleston
33813.abstract: Korea’s labor force shift toward older, female, and more educated workers has been even more dramatic than that of the US in recent decades. This paper documents how Korean job characteristics vary by age and characterizes the “age-friendliness” of Korean employment from 2000 to 2020 by applying the Age-Friendliness Index (AFI) developed by Acemoglu, Mühlbach and Scott to Korean occupational data. The AFI measures job characteristics—such as physical demands and job autonomy—based on occupational descriptions and worker preferences. Our primary empirical findings are that the age-friendliness of Korean jobs grew more slowly than in the US, and that older Koreans were not the main beneficiaries of these jobs. Both findings reflect the demographic, labor market, and institutional differences between Korea and the US. Slow growth of AFI can be partially explained by labor market rigidities, the role of large firms in Korea, and the flattening of managerial structures.
33813.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，韩国劳动力向更年长、女性化和受教育程度更高的工人转变，其剧烈程度甚至超过了美国。本文记录了韩国工作特征如何随年龄变化，并通过将Acemoglu、Mühlbach和Scott开发的适龄友好指数（AFI）应用于韩国职业数据，刻画了2000年至2020年韩国就业的“适龄友好性”。AFI基于职业描述和工人偏好衡量工作特征，如体力要求和自主性。我们的主要实证发现是，韩国工作的适龄友好性增长慢于美国，且年长韩国人并非这些工作的主要受益者。这两个发现都反映了韩国与美国在人口结构、劳动力市场和制度上的差异。AFI增长缓慢可部分归因于劳动力市场刚性、韩国大企业的作用以及管理结构的扁平化。

33812.title: Workers Pay the Price: Effort, Identity, and Emotional Well-Being
33812.zh_title: 努力、身份认同与员工心理健康
33812.abstract: Why do workers exert effort at their tasks and what are the implications for their well-being when greater effort is necessary? This paper, which studies university employees during the Covid-19 pandemic, provides empirical evidence that identity – in terms of both the importance of work to employees’ sense of self and the extent to which their employer shares their values – is related to both effort and productivity. Those employees who feel work is important to them and feel the university does not share their values report exerting more effort but accomplishing less, relative to a pre-pandemic benchmark. Furthermore, all these factors are associated with employee’s reported mental health. Stress and anxiety are particularly elevated for employees for whom work is important and who feel the employer does not share their values, with similar patterns for depression symptoms and worse overall mental health relative to pre-pandemic. These relationships hold across job roles (faculty vs. staff) and the number of co-resident children. The research suggests a new direction in the study of incentives and organizations: links between non-pecuniary motivations and work-related mental health.
33812.zh_abstract: 为什么员工会在工作中付出努力？当需要付出更多努力时，这对他们的福祉有何影响？本文以新冠疫情期间的大学员工为研究对象，提供了实证证据，表明身份认同——即工作对员工自我认知的重要性，以及雇主与员工价值观的契合程度——与努力程度和生产力均相关。与疫情前的基准相比，那些认为工作对自己很重要、但感觉大学与自身价值观不符的员工，报告付出了更多努力，但完成的工作却更少。此外，所有这些因素都与员工自述的心理健康状况相关。对于那些认为工作重要且感觉雇主与自身价值观不符的员工而言，压力和焦虑感尤为突出，抑郁症状也呈现类似模式，整体心理健康状况较疫情前更差。这些关系在不同工作角色（教师与职员）以及同住子女数量之间均保持稳定。该研究为激励与组织研究指明了新方向：非金钱动机与工作相关心理健康之间的联系。

33811.title: The Spill-back and Spillover Effects of US Monetary Policy: Evidence on an International Cost Channel
33811.zh_title: 美国货币政策的回溢与溢出效应：基于国际成本渠道的证据
33811.authors: Yao Amber Li, Lingfei Lu, Shang-Jin Wei, Jingbo Yao
33811.abstract: We find that an unanticipated tightening of US monetary policy tends to raise US import prices. This empirical “spill-back” pattern differs from the predictions of typical open-economy macro models. We also document a new empirical "spillover" effect: import prices of other countries also rise following an unexpected US monetary tightening. To understand the mechanism, we examine Chinese exporters and identify a borrowing cost channel—their liquidity conditions generally deteriorate after a US monetary tightening. Indeed, the output price response is greater for those firms facing higher borrowing costs or tighter liquidity conditions.
33811.zh_abstract: 我们发现，美国货币政策意外收紧往往会推高美国进口价格。这种实证上的“回溢”模式与典型开放经济宏观模型的预测不同。我们还记录了一种新的实证“溢出”效应：在美国意外收紧货币政策后，其他国家的进口价格也会上涨。为了理解其机制，我们考察了中国出口商，并识别出一个借贷成本渠道——在美国货币政策收紧后，它们的流动性状况普遍恶化。事实上，那些面临更高借贷成本或更紧张流动性状况的企业，其产出价格反应更大。

33810.title: Partisan Corporate Speech
33810.abstract: We construct a novel measure of partisan corporate speech using natural language processing techniques and use it to establish three stylized facts. First, the volume of partisan corporate speech has risen sharply between 2012 and 2022. Second, this increase has been disproportionately driven by companies adopting more Democratic-leaning language, a trend that is widespread across industries, geographies, and CEO political affiliations. Third, partisan corporate statements are followed by negative abnormal stock returns, with significant heterogeneity by shareholders’ degree of alignment with the statement. Finally, we propose a theoretical framework and provide suggestive empirical evidence that these trends are at least in part driven by a shift in investors’ nonpecuniary preferences with respect to partisan corporate speech.
33810.zh_abstract: 我们利用自然语言处理技术构建了一个新颖的党派性企业言论衡量指标，并据此确立了三个典型事实。第一，在2012年至2022年间，党派性企业言论的数量急剧上升。第二，这种增长不成比例地由采用更倾向民主党语言的公司在推动，这一趋势普遍存在于各个行业、地区以及CEO的政治派别中。第三，党派性企业声明发布后，会出现负面的异常股票回报，且该回报与股东对声明的认同程度存在显著异质性。最后，我们提出了一个理论框架，并提供了提示性的实证证据，表明这些趋势至少部分是由投资者对党派性企业言论的非金钱偏好转变所驱动的。
33810.meta: Programs：CF, POL；JEL：G0, G1, G23, G3, G4

33809.title: Tax Preferences and Housing Affordability: Explorations using a Life-Cycle Model
33809.zh_title: 税收优惠与住房可负担性：基于生命周期模型的探索
33809.abstract: We present a dynamic life-cycle model of demand for owner-occupied housing, investment property and liquid assets. Households face transaction costs, downpayment requirements, liquidity constraints, and tax preferences for owner-occupied housing. The model replicates key facts about home ownership, liquid assets, debt and consumption. It predicts taxing imputed rent would raise enough revenue to fund a 9.15% income tax rate cut, and increase ex ante welfare of all agents. Eliminating the mortgage interest deduction (MID) also gives a Pareto improvement. Replacing MID with a refundable 24.6% mortgage interest credit would increase the ownership rate by 5.9%. Gains are concentrated among low to middle income households and young households, as housing becomes more affordable for them.
33809.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个关于自住住房、投资性房产和流动资产需求的动态生命周期模型。家庭面临交易成本、首付要求、流动性约束以及针对自住住房的税收优惠。该模型复现了关于住房拥有率、流动资产、债务和消费的关键事实。模型预测，对估算租金征税将筹集足够资金，以支持将所得税税率降低9.15%，并提高所有代理人的事前福利。取消抵押贷款利息扣除（MID）也能带来帕累托改进。用可退还的24.6%抵押贷款利息抵免取代MID，将使住房拥有率提高5.9%。收益主要集中在低收入至中等收入家庭和年轻家庭，因为对他们而言，住房变得更加可负担。
33809.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：G11, G51, H20, H31, R21

33808.title: Expectations Formation with Fat-Tailed Processes: Evidence and Theory
33808.zh_title: 厚尾过程中的预期形成：证据与理论
33808.authors: Tim de Silva, Eugene Larsen-Hallock, Adam Rej, David Thesmar
33808.abstract: This paper studies expectations formation when the underlying process has fat tails. Using a large sample of firm sales growth expectations, we document three facts: (i) the relationship between forecast revisions and future forecast errors is strongly non-linear, (ii) the distribution of sales growth has fat tails, and (iii) extreme values of sales growth tend to mean-revert. We formally show that these three facts are consistent with a model in which the underlying process is non-Gaussian, but forecasters fail to recognize this fully. We estimate this model and show it quantitatively explains our three facts. Finally, we show the model is consistent with evidence from an online forecasting experiment where the underlying process is non-Gaussian and the non-linearity in the momentum of stock returns.
33808.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当基础过程具有厚尾特征时的预期形成。利用企业销售增长预期的大样本数据，我们记录了三个事实：（i）预测修正与未来预测误差之间的关系呈现强非线性；（ii）销售增长的分布具有厚尾特征；（iii）销售增长的极端值倾向于均值回归。我们正式证明，这三个事实与一个模型是一致的，在该模型中，基础过程是非高斯的，但预测者未能完全认识到这一点。我们估计了这个模型，并表明它能够定量解释我们的三个事实。最后，我们展示了该模型与来自在线预测实验（其中基础过程是非高斯的）以及股票回报动量非线性的证据是一致的。

33807.title: What Works for the Unemployed? Evidence From Quasi-Random Caseworker Assignments
33807.zh_title: 什么对失业者有效？来自准随机个案工作者分配的证据
33807.authors: Anders Humlum, Jakob Munch, Mette Rasmussen
33807.abstract: This paper examines if active labor market programs help unemployed job seekers find jobs using a novel random caseworker instrumental variable (IV) design. Leveraging administrative data from Denmark, our identification strategy exploits that (i) job seekers are quasi-randomly assigned to caseworkers, and (ii) caseworkers differ in their tendencies to assign similar job seekers to different programs. Using our IV strategy, we find assignment to classroom training increases employment by 29% two years after initial job loss of compliers. This finding contrasts with the conclusion reached by ordinary least squares (OLS), which suffers from a negative bias due to selection on unobservables. The employment effects are driven by job seekers who complete the programs (post-program effects) rather than job seekers who exit unemployment upon assignment (threat effects), and the programs help job seekers change occupations. We show that job seekers exposed to offshoring – who tend to experience larger and more persistent employment losses – also have higher employment gains from classroom training. By estimating marginal treatment effects, we conclude that total employment may be increased by targeting training toward job seekers exposed to offshoring.
33807.zh_abstract: 本文利用一种新颖的随机个案工作者工具变量（IV）设计，考察了积极的劳动力市场项目是否有助于失业求职者找到工作。利用丹麦的行政数据，我们的识别策略利用了以下两点：（i）求职者被准随机地分配给个案工作者，以及（ii）个案工作者在将相似求职者分配到不同项目上的倾向存在差异。通过使用我们的工具变量策略，我们发现，对于依从者而言，在初次失业两年后，被分配到课堂培训使就业率提高了29%。这一发现与普通最小二乘法（OLS）得出的结论形成对比，后者因不可观测因素的选择性偏差而存在负向偏误。就业效应是由完成项目的求职者（项目后效应）驱动的，而非在分配时退出失业的求职者（威胁效应），并且这些项目帮助求职者转换职业。我们表明，面临离岸外包风险的求职者——他们往往经历更大且更持久的就业损失——也从课堂培训中获得了更高的就业收益。通过估计边际处理效应，我们得出结论，通过将培训针对面临离岸外包风险的求职者，可以增加总就业。

33806.title: The Rise and Retreat of US Inflation: An Update
33806.zh_title: 美国通胀的上升与回落：更新
33806.authors: Laurence M. Ball, Daniel Leigh, Prachi Mishra
33806.abstract: Why did US inflation rise over 2021-22 and why has it retreated since then? Ball, Leigh, and Mishra (2022), writing near the inflation peak, explained the rise with a framework in which inflation depends on three factors: long-term expectations; the tightness of the labor market as measured by the vacancy-to-unemployment (V/U) ratio; and large changes in relative prices in particular industries such as energy and autos. This paper finds that the same framework explains the retreat in inflation since our earlier work.
33806.zh_abstract: 为什么美国通胀在2021-22年上升，又为何自那以后回落？Ball, Leigh, and Mishra (2022) 在通胀高峰附近撰文，用一个框架解释了通胀的上升，该框架认为通胀取决于三个因素：长期预期；以职位空缺与失业率（V/U）之比衡量的劳动力市场紧张程度；以及特定行业（如能源和汽车）相对价格的大幅变化。本文发现，同样的框架也解释了自我们早期工作以来通胀的回落。

33805.title: Tax Avoidance as an R&D Subsidy: The Use of Cost Sharing Agreements by US Multinationals
33805.zh_title: 作为研发补贴的避税行为：美国跨国公司对成本分摊协议的使用
33805.authors: Lysle Boller, Clare M. Doyle, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato
33805.abstract: We use administrative corporate tax data from the IRS to study a particular form of tax avoidance for US multinational corporations (MNCs). This strategy relies on cost sharing agreements (CSAs), which govern joint R&D efforts conducted with foreign affiliates and allow US MNCs to shift profits by moving intellectual property abroad. We analyze an unexpected 2005 Tax Court ruling that additionally allowed MNCs with CSAs to engage in cost shifting: by excluding employee stock option compensation costs from CSAs, the ruling allowed MNCs to allocate these formerly-shared costs entirely to their US parent corporations. This in turn increased the domestic tax deduction associated with R&D expenses, generating a tax shield that lowered the after-tax cost of domestic R&D. We show that the regulatory change increased market value, R&D investment, and cost shifting margins among US MNCs with CSAs following the ruling. Our results demonstrate how tax minimization strategies can translate into real changes in innovative economic activity.
33805.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国国税局（IRS）的企业税收行政数据，研究美国跨国公司（MNCs）的一种特定避税形式。这种策略依赖于成本分摊协议（CSAs），该协议规范了与外国子公司共同进行的研发活动，并允许美国跨国公司通过将知识产权转移到海外来转移利润。我们分析了2005年一项意外的税务法院裁决，该裁决额外允许拥有CSAs的跨国公司进行成本转移：通过将员工股票期权薪酬成本排除在CSAs之外，该裁决允许跨国公司将这些原本共担的成本完全分配给其美国母公司。这反过来增加了与研发费用相关的国内税收抵扣，产生了一个税收盾牌，降低了国内研发的税后成本。我们表明，在该裁决之后，拥有CSAs的美国跨国公司的市场价值、研发投资和成本转移幅度均有所增加。我们的结果证明了税收最小化策略如何能够转化为创新经济活动的实际变化。

33804.title: Native-Immigrant Entrepreneurial Synergies
33804.zh_title: 本土与移民创业者的协同效应
33804.authors: Zhao Jin, Amir Kermani, Timothy McQuade
33804.abstract: We examine the performance of startups co-founded by immigrant and native teams. Leveraging unique data linking startups to founders' and employees' employment and education histories, we find native-migrant teams outperform native-only and migrant-only teams. Native-migrant startups have larger employment three years after founding, are more likely to secure funding, access larger funding rounds, and achieve more successful exits. An instrumental variables strategy based on native shares in university-degree programs confirms native-migrant teams are larger and more likely to receive funding. Superior access to diverse labor pools, successful VCs, and expanded product markets are key factors in driving native-migrant outperformance.
33804.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由移民和本土团队共同创立的初创企业的表现。利用将初创企业与创始人及员工的就业和教育历史关联起来的独特数据，我们发现本土-移民团队的表现优于纯本土团队和纯移民团队。本土-移民初创企业在成立三年后拥有更大的就业规模，更有可能获得融资，能进入更大规模的融资轮次，并实现更成功的退出。一项基于大学学位项目中本土学生占比的工具变量策略证实，本土-移民团队规模更大且更有可能获得资金。对多样化劳动力库、成功风险投资以及扩展产品市场的优越获取渠道，是推动本土-移民团队表现优异的关键因素。
33804.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F22, G24, L26, M13, O32

33803.title: Should Governments Restrict Foreign Investments in Startups?
33803.zh_title: 政府应限制对初创企业的外国投资吗？
33803.authors: Fiona Paine, Richard R. Townsend, Ting Xu
33803.abstract: This paper examines the evolving policy landscape surrounding foreign investment restrictions in innovative startups. Drawing on recent research, we analyze both the security benefits and economic costs of policies like the Foreign Investment Risk Review Modernization Act (FIRRMA). The evidence suggests that foreign investments do facilitate measurable cross-border knowledge spillovers that may raise legitimate security concerns. However, restricting these investments imposes significant costs on domestic innovation ecosystems, including reduced capital availability, disrupted investor networks, and potentially diminished innovation outcomes. These effects extend well beyond directly targeted foreign investors to affect domestic venture firms and startups. We explore design considerations for more effective investment screening policies, including industry targeting, investor heterogeneity, and implementation approaches, as well as complementary policies that might address security concerns while minimizing costs to innovation. We conclude by outlining promising directions for future research on this increasingly important intersection of innovation policy and national security.
33803.zh_abstract: 本文考察了围绕创新初创企业外国投资限制的不断演变的政策格局。基于近期研究，我们分析了诸如《外国投资风险评估现代化法案》等政策的安全收益和经济成本。证据表明，外国投资确实促进了可衡量的跨境知识溢出，这可能引发合理的安全担忧。然而，限制这些投资会给国内创新生态系统带来显著成本，包括资本可用性降低、投资者网络中断以及潜在的创新成果减少。这些影响远远超出直接针对的外国投资者，波及国内风险投资公司和初创企业。我们探讨了更有效投资筛选政策的设计考量，包括行业针对性、投资者异质性和实施方法，以及可能在不损害创新的情况下解决安全担忧的补充政策。最后，我们概述了未来研究这一日益重要的创新政策与国家安全交叉领域的富有前景的方向。
33803.meta: Programs：CF, ITI, POL, PR；JEL：F50, F65, G15, G18, G24, O3

33802.title: Convergence? Thoughts About the Evolution of Mainstream Macroeconomics Over the Last 40 Years
33802.zh_title: 趋同？关于过去40年主流宏观经济学演变的思考
33802.abstract:
This year marks the 40th anniversary of the NBER Macro Annual Conference, founded in 1986. This paper reviews the evolution of mainstream macroeconomics since then. It presents my views, informed by a survey of a number of researchers who have made important contributions to the field. I develop two main arguments.
The first is that, starting from strikingly different positions, there has been substantial convergence, in terms of methodology, architecture, and main mechanisms. Methodology: Explicit micro foundations, explicit treatment of distortions, with, at the same time, an increased willingness to deviate from rational expectations, neoclassical utility and profit maximization. Architecture: The wide acceptance of nominal rigidities as an essential distortion, although with mixed feelings. Mechanisms: The wide nature of the shocks to both the demand and the supply side.
The second is that this convergence has been, for the most part, good convergence, i.e. the creation of a generally accepted conceptual and analytical structure, a core to which additional distortions can be added, allowing for discussions and integration of new ideas and evidence, rather than fights about basic methodology. Not everything is right however, with too much emphasis on general equilibrium implications from the start, rather than, first, on partial equilibrium analysis of the phenomenon at hand. 

The appendix to the paper gives a sample of the views of the members of the survey on each of these arguments.
33802.zh_abstract: 今年是NBER宏观年度会议创办40周年（始于1986年）。本文回顾了自那时起主流宏观经济学的演变。本文阐述了我的观点，这些观点基于对多位为该领域做出重要贡献的研究人员的调查。我提出了两个主要论点。第一个论点是，从截然不同的立场出发，在方法论、架构和主要机制方面已出现实质性趋同。方法论：明确的微观基础，对扭曲的明确处理，同时更愿意偏离理性预期、新古典效用和利润最大化。架构：广泛接受名义刚性作为一种基本扭曲，尽管态度复杂。机制：需求侧和供给侧冲击的广泛性质。第二个论点是，这种趋同在很大程度上是良好的趋同，即建立了一个普遍接受的概念和分析结构，一个可以添加额外扭曲的核心，允许讨论和整合新思想与证据，而非围绕基本方法论的争论。然而，并非一切皆正确，从一开始就过度强调一般均衡含义，而非首先对当前现象进行局部均衡分析。论文附录给出了调查成员对每个论点看法的样本。

33801.title: Political Control Over Redistricting and the Partisan Balance in Congress
33801.zh_title: 选区重划的政治控制与国会党派平衡
33801.authors: Kenneth Coriale, Daniel A. Kolliner, Ethan Kaplan
33801.abstract: We estimate the impact of a political party's ability to unilaterally redistrict Congressional seats upon partisan seat share allocations in the U.S. House of Representatives. Controlling for stateXdecade and year effects, we find an 8.2 percentage point increase in the Republican House seat share in the three elections following Republican control over redistricting in the 2000 and 2010 redistricting cycles. We only find significant effects for Democrats in large states. Effects are one half of the average seat gap between the parties in the 2010s. Differences across parties reflect more denied trifectas due to an opposite party governor in Democratic states and greater impacts for Republicans in small states. Differences do not reflect a rise in racial gerrymandering.
33801.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个政党单方面重划国会选区的能力对美国众议院党派席位分配的影响。在控制州×十年和年份效应后，我们发现，在2000年和2010年重划周期中，共和党控制选区重划后的三次选举中，共和党在众议院的席位比例增加了8.2个百分点。我们仅在大型州发现对民主党有显著影响。这些影响是2010年代两党平均席位差距的一半。两党间的差异反映了民主党州因反对党州长而更多被否决的“三连胜”局面，以及共和党在小型州更大的影响。这些差异并不反映种族选区划分的加剧。

33800.title: College Course Shutouts
33800.authors: Kevin J. Mumford, Richard W. Patterson, Anthony Yim
33800.abstract: What happens when college students cannot enroll in the courses they want? Using conditional random assignment to oversubscribed courses at a large public university, we find that a course shutout reduces the probability that a student ever takes any course in the corresponding subject by 30%. Course shutouts are particularly disruptive for female students, reducing women's cumulative GPAs, probability of majoring in STEM, on-time graduation, and early-career earnings. In contrast, shutouts do not appear to be disruptive to male students' long-run outcomes, with one exception—shutouts significantly increase the probability that men choose a major from the business school.
33800.zh_abstract: 当大学生无法注册他们想要的课程时会发生什么？利用一所大型公立大学超额订阅课程的条件随机分配，我们发现，课程选课受阻使学生修读相应学科任何课程的概率降低30%。课程选课受阻对女学生的干扰尤其严重，降低了女性的累积平均绩点、主修STEM专业的概率、按时毕业率以及早期职业收入。相比之下，选课受阻似乎对男学生的长期结果没有破坏性影响，但有一个例外——选课受阻显著增加了男性选择商学院专业的概率。

33860.title: The Geography of Opportunity after the Civil War: Black and White Americans’ Intra- and Intergenerational Mobility into Property Ownership
33860.zh_title: 内战后机遇的地理分布：黑人与白人美国人在财产所有权上的代内与代际流动性
33860.authors: William J. Collins, Nicholas C. Holtkamp
33860.abstract: This paper sheds new light on historical black-white disparities in wealth and economic mobility by examining datasets of linked census records. First, we compare black and white men’s intra- and intergenerational mobility into property ownership between 1870, the first census taken after the Civil War, and 1900. Conditional on not owning property in 1870, black men’s mobility rate into property ownership was far lower than white men’s. If black men’s post-1870 mobility had mirrored that of landless white men, the black-white home ownership gap in 1900 would have been small. Second, we show that for black men located in cotton-intensive counties in 1870, the likelihood of owning property in 1900 was far lower than for black men located elsewhere. This is salient in national samples as well as in samples restricted to the states of the former Confederacy, with and without extensive controls. The pattern is connected to the prevalence of sharecropping and relatively high black population shares. For white men, the difference in upward mobility between cotton-intensive and other areas was much smaller. Many black households acquired land and homes of their own in this era, an important channel for economic advance, but their geographic concentration in areas with fewer opportunities to acquire property implied low aggregate rates of upward mobility.
33860.zh_abstract: 本文通过分析关联的人口普查记录数据集，为历史上黑人与白人在财富和经济流动性上的差距提供了新的视角。首先，我们比较了1870年（内战后首次人口普查）至1900年间黑人与白人男性在财产所有权上的代内与代际流动性。在1870年未拥有财产的条件下，黑人男性进入财产所有权的流动率远低于白人男性。如果黑人男性在1870年后的流动性能与无土地的白人男性相当，那么1900年的黑白住房拥有率差距将会很小。其次，我们发现，对于1870年位于棉花密集型县的黑人男性，其在1900年拥有财产的可能性远低于位于其他地区的黑人男性。这一现象在全国样本以及仅限于前邦联各州的样本中均显著存在，无论是否加入大量控制变量。这种模式与分成制佃农的盛行以及相对较高的黑人人口比例有关。对于白人男性而言，棉花密集型地区与其他地区之间向上流动性的差异要小得多。在这一时期，许多黑人家庭获得了自己的土地和房屋，这是经济进步的重要渠道，但他们在地理上集中于财产获取机会较少的地区，导致了总体向上流动率较低。

33859.title: Decoupling Taste-Based versus Statistical Discrimination in Elections
33859.zh_title: 在选举中分离基于偏好的歧视与统计性歧视
33859.authors: Amanda de Albuquerque, Frederico Finan, Anubhav Jha, Laura Karpuska, Francesco Trebbi
33859.abstract: We present a methodology for decoupling taste-based versus statistical discrimination in political behavior. We combine a flexible empirical model of voting, featuring vertical and horizontal candidate differentiation in gender, ability, and policy positions, with a large-scale micro-targeted electoral experiment aimed at increasing female candidate vote shares. Our structural econometric approach allows to separately identify preference parameters driving taste-based discrimination and beliefs parameters driving statistical discrimination through expectations about ability and policy positions of female politicians. Our application to Brazilian municipal elections uncovers substantial levels of taste-based and statistical discrimination. Counterfactual political campaigns show promise in reducing both.
33859.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种在政治行为中分离基于偏好的歧视与统计性歧视的方法。我们将一个灵活的投票实证模型（该模型在性别、能力及政策立场上包含纵向和横向的候选人差异化）与一项旨在提高女性候选人得票率的大规模微观定向选举实验相结合。我们的结构计量经济学方法能够分别识别驱动基于偏好的歧视的偏好参数，以及通过关于女性政治家能力和政策立场的预期来驱动统计性歧视的信念参数。我们将该方法应用于巴西市政选举，发现了显著的基于偏好的歧视和统计性歧视。反事实的政治竞选活动在减少这两种歧视方面显示出潜力。

33858.title: Inflation, Expectations and Monetary Policy: What Have We Learned and to What End?
33858.zh_title: 通胀、预期与货币政策：我们学到了什么，目标何在？
33858.abstract: We review recent research and experiences linking inflation and expectations, emphasizing what has been learned since 2020. One clear lesson is that the inflation expectations of most economic agents have been and remain unanchored. The unanchored nature of inflation expectations, in combination with supply shocks, can explain much of the inflation surge and subsequent disinflation when viewed through the lens of an expectations-augmented Phillips curve, both in the U.S. and abroad. New policy frameworks are unlikely to address this feature of expectations. Only a communication strategy that breaks what we refer to as the “cycle of selective inattention” is likely to be successful, but it is probably already too late to stop the next inflation surge.
33858.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了近期关于通胀与预期之间联系的研究与经验，重点强调了自2020年以来的发现。一个明确的教训是，大多数经济主体的通胀预期过去是、现在仍然是脱锚的。通胀预期的脱锚性质，结合供给冲击，可以通过预期增强型菲利普斯曲线的视角解释美国及海外通胀飙升及随后的反通胀过程的大部分。新的政策框架不太可能解决预期的这一特征。只有一种打破我们称之为“选择性忽视循环”的沟通策略才有可能成功，但可能已经为时已晚，无法阻止下一次通胀飙升。

33857.title: Recovering from COVID
33857.authors: James H. Stock, Mark W. Watson
33857.abstract: The COVID business cycle was unique. The recession was by far the deepest and shortest in the U.S. postwar record and the recovery was remarkably rapid. The cycle saw an unprecedented reallocation of employment and consumption away from in-person services towards goods that can be consumed at home and outdoors. This paper provides a simple empirical model that attributes these and other anomalies in real economic activity to a single unobserved shock. That shock is closely connected to COVID deaths, and diminishes in importance over the expansion, consistent with self-protective measures like masking, COVID fatigue, and eventually the availability of the vaccine. The COVID shock and anomalous COVID dynamics largely disappeared by late 2022. It appears that macrodynamics have returned to normal and that the structural shifts wrought by the pandemic have had limited effects on the underlying economic trends of key indicators, despite notable changes like the prevalence of remote work. The greatest macroeconomic legacy of the COVID business cycle has been on the national debt.
33857.zh_abstract: 新冠商业周期是独一无二的。此次衰退是美国战后记录中最深且最短的，复苏也异常迅速。该周期见证了就业和消费从面对面服务向可在家庭和户外消费的商品前所未有的重新配置。本文提供了一个简单的实证模型，将实际经济活动中的这些及其他异常现象归因于一个单一未观测到的冲击。该冲击与新冠死亡人数密切相关，并在经济扩张过程中重要性逐渐减弱，这与戴口罩等自我保护措施、新冠疲劳以及最终疫苗的可用性相一致。新冠冲击和异常的新冠动态在2022年底基本消失。宏观动态似乎已恢复正常，尽管出现了远程工作普及等显著变化，但疫情造成的结构性转变对关键指标的潜在经济趋势影响有限。新冠商业周期最大的宏观经济遗产体现在国家债务上。

33856.title: Real-world Effectiveness of the Influenza Vaccine in Young Children
33856.zh_title: 流感疫苗在幼儿中的真实世界有效性
33856.authors: Michael L. Anderson, Carlos Dobkin, Devon Gorry, Hung-Fu Tseng
33856.abstract: Influenza causes substantial illness and healthcare utilization among children. Randomized clinical trials (RCTs) demonstrate that the influenza vaccine reduces influenza illness detectable via active surveillance, but RCTs typically have insufficient samples to examine economically meaningful outcomes such as healthcare provider visits. In this study we document that children aged two through five whose well-child visits occur when the seasonal influenza vaccine is broadly available are 23.4 percentage points more likely to be vaccinated than those whose visits do not. Using large administrative healthcare datasets, we leverage this variation in vaccination rates to show that the influenza vaccine reduces outpatient and emergency department visits significantly. The results imply that making pediatric influenza vaccinations more convenient could substantially increase vaccination rates and reduce healthcare expenditures.
33856.zh_abstract: 流感导致儿童出现大量疾病和医疗资源使用。随机临床试验表明，流感疫苗可减少通过主动监测发现的流感疾病，但临床试验通常样本量不足，无法检验具有经济意义的结果，如医疗服务提供者就诊。在本研究中，我们记录了年龄在2至5岁之间的儿童，如果其健康儿童就诊时间恰逢季节性流感疫苗广泛可用的时期，其接种疫苗的可能性比就诊时间不在该时期的儿童高出23.4个百分点。利用大型行政医疗数据集，我们利用疫苗接种率的这种变化来证明流感疫苗能显著减少门诊和急诊就诊。结果表明，提高儿童流感疫苗接种的便利性可以大幅提高接种率并减少医疗支出。

33855.title: The Structural Transformation of Innovation
33855.authors: Diego A. Comin, Danial Lashkari, Martí Mestieri
33855.abstract: We document the structural transformation of innovation using historical patent data since the 1850s, along with R&D expenditure and TFP growth for the post-war period. Over time, innovation has shifted from agricultural sectors to manufacturing, and, more recently, to services. We develop and quantify a multi-sector semi-endogenous growth model of structural change in innovation and production, incorporating the classical demand-pull and technology-push drivers of innovation. Sectors differ in their innovation technologies, and the extent to which they benefit from knowledge spillovers (technology-push). Nonhomothetic demand shifts the market shares toward income-elastic sectors along the growth process (demand-pull). A calibrated version of our model replicates the structural transformations of innovation and production observed in the US data. Using the model, we evaluate the future impact of Baumol’s disease on aggregate productivity and find it to be minimal. Our results suggest that aggregate productivity growth may recover in the coming decades as the service sector becomes increasingly innovation-driven.
33855.zh_abstract: 我们利用自1850年代以来的历史专利数据，以及战后时期的研发支出和全要素生产率增长，记录了创新的结构性转型。随着时间的推移，创新已从农业部门转向制造业，并在近期转向服务业。我们开发并量化了一个包含创新和生产结构性变化的多部门半内生增长模型，该模型融合了经典的创新需求拉动和技术推动驱动因素。各部门在创新技术以及从知识溢出（技术推动）中获益的程度上存在差异。非位似需求在增长过程中将市场份额转向收入弹性高的部门（需求拉动）。我们模型的校准版本复制了美国数据中观察到的创新和生产的结构性转型。利用该模型，我们评估了鲍莫尔病对未来生产率的潜在影响，发现其影响微乎其微。我们的结果表明，随着服务业日益成为创新驱动，未来几十年全要素生产率增长可能会恢复。
33855.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：E02, O1, O4, O5

33854.title: Internal Migration and the Spatial Reorganization of Agriculture
33854.zh_title: 内部迁移与农业的空间重组
33854.authors: Raahil Madhok, Frederik Noack, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak, Olivier Deschenes
33854.abstract: This paper studies how agricultural production responds to the loss of agricultural labor during the process of urbanization and structural transformation. Using household microdata from India and exogenous variation in migration opportunities induced by urban income shocks, we show that agricultural households do not systematically replace lost labor with increased capital. Instead, they cultivate less land and lower their use of agricultural technology, reducing crop production. Resulting changes in land and crop prices induce non-migrant households to expand agricultural investments and production. In aggregate, market adaptation mitigates over three-fourths of the direct agricultural losses from urbanization. Spatial reorganization moves food production from land near urban areas toward more remote areas with lower emigration.
33854.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在城市化与结构性转型过程中，农业生产如何应对农业劳动力的流失。利用印度家庭微观数据以及由城市收入冲击引发的迁移机会的外生变化，我们表明农业家庭并未系统地用增加的资本来替代流失的劳动力。相反，他们耕种更少的土地，降低农业技术的使用，从而减少了作物产量。由此导致的土地和作物价格变化促使非迁移家庭扩大农业投资和生产。总体而言，市场适应缓解了城市化对农业造成的直接损失的四分之三以上。空间重组将粮食生产从靠近城市地区的土地转移到移民迁出率更高的更偏远地区。
33854.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：J43, O13, O15, Q15, R11

33853.title: Local Monetary Policy
33853.authors: Vyacheslav Fos, Tommaso Tamburelli, Nancy R. Xu
33853.abstract: When Federal Reserve districts experience high inflation or low unemployment but lack voting rights to influence FOMC decisions, credit extended to commercial banks through the Discount Window (DW) declines. Our identification strategy is based on the exogenous rotation of voting rights among Reserve Banks and on within borrower-time and district-time variation in DW loans and Federal Home Loan Bank (FHLB) loans, implying that factors related to changes in macroeconomic conditions, local credit demand, or borrower characteristics do not drive the results. The effect on bank funding sources translates into changes in the composition of loans extended by commercial banks.
33853.zh_abstract: 当联邦储备区经历高通胀或低失业率但缺乏影响联邦公开市场委员会决策的投票权时，通过贴现窗口向商业银行提供的信贷会减少。我们的识别策略基于储备银行投票权的外生轮换，以及借款方-时间层面和地区-时间层面在贴现窗口贷款与联邦住房贷款银行贷款上的差异，这意味着与宏观经济状况变化、当地信贷需求或借款方特征相关的因素并非驱动结果的原因。对银行资金来源的影响转化为商业银行发放贷款构成的变化。
33853.meta: Programs：CF, ME, POL；JEL：D7, E5, E51, E58

33852.title: How Damaging is Shouting "Fire" in a Crowded Theatre?
33852.zh_title: 在拥挤的剧院里喊“着火了”会造成多大损害？
33852.abstract: The canonical example of unprotected speech—falsely shouting “fire” in a crowded theatre—presumes such an act inevitably causes harmful panic. This paper challenges that presumption through a game-theoretic analysis of evacuation dynamics. I model a theatre as an N × M grid where rational patrons navigate spatial constraints while evacuating. Strategic conflicts arise only when patrons are equidistant from exits, creating localized “clash games” that admit multiple equilibria, including numerous pure-strategy equilibria that achieve zero-collision evacuations. Using global games methodology, I show that strategic uncertainty uniquely selects an equilibrium, where those entering from rows have precedence over those already in aisles. However, introducing a panic mechanism based on accumulated waiting time reveals a tension: the strategically optimal East-priority equilibrium proves most vulnerable to behavioral breakdown, while the alternating equilibrium exhibits superior robustness to panic. These findings suggest that whether false alarms cause harmful disorder depends critically on the interaction between spatial geometry, strategic behavior, and psychological limits—not merely on the alarm itself.
33852.zh_abstract: 不受保护的言论的典型例子——在拥挤的剧院里虚假地喊“着火了”——假定这种行为不可避免地会导致有害的恐慌。本文通过博弈论分析疏散动态来挑战这一假定。我将剧院建模为一个N×M的网格，其中理性的顾客在疏散时需应对空间限制。只有当顾客与出口距离相等时，才会出现战略冲突，从而产生局部化的“冲突博弈”，这类博弈允许多重均衡，包括许多实现零碰撞疏散的纯策略均衡。利用全局博弈方法，我表明战略不确定性唯一地选择了一个均衡，在该均衡中，从排内进入的顾客优先于已在过道中的顾客。然而，引入基于累积等待时间的恐慌机制揭示了一种张力：战略上最优的“东侧优先”均衡在行为崩溃方面最为脆弱，而交替均衡则表现出对恐慌的卓越稳健性。这些发现表明，虚假警报是否会导致有害的混乱，关键取决于空间几何、战略行为和心理极限之间的相互作用，而不仅仅是警报本身。

33851.title: Remote Work, Employee Mix, and Performance
33851.zh_title: 远程工作、员工构成与绩效
33851.authors: Cevat Giray Aksoy, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Victoria Marino, Cem Ozguzel
33851.abstract: We study the shift to fully remote work at a large call center in Turkey, highlighting three findings. First, fully remote work increased the share of women, including married women, rural and smaller-town residents. By accessing groups with traditionally lower labor-force participation the firm was able to increase its share of graduate employees by 14% without raising wages. Second, workforce productivity rose by 10%, reflecting shorter call durations for remote employees. This was facilitated by a quieter home working environment, avoiding the background noise in the office. Third, fully remote employees with initial in-person training saw higher long-run remote productivity and lower attrition rates. This underscores the advantages of initial in-person onboarding for fully remote employees.
33851.zh_abstract: 我们研究了土耳其一家大型呼叫中心向完全远程工作的转变，突出了三个发现。首先，完全远程工作提高了女性（包括已婚女性）、农村和小城镇居民的比例。通过接触传统上劳动参与率较低的群体，该公司能够在未提高工资的情况下，将其毕业生员工比例提高14%。其次，员工生产率提高了10%，这反映了远程员工通话时长的缩短。这得益于更安静的家庭工作环境，避免了办公室的背景噪音。第三，接受过初始面对面培训的完全远程员工，其长期远程生产率更高，离职率也更低。这凸显了为完全远程员工提供初始面对面入职培训的优势。
33851.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：J0

33850.title: The Old Keynesian Model
33850.abstract: Articles from the 1970s applied a general-disequilibrium framework to the determination of output and employment with sticky nominal prices and wages. Quantities are determined on the short sides of the goods and labor market and involve non-price rationing. With general excess supply, where prices and wages are “too high,” output and employment are determined by the Keynesian demand multiplier, based on the marginal propensity to consume. In the case of general excess demand, where prices and wages are “too low,” output and employment are determined by a supplier multiplier, based on the marginal propensity to work. In these two cases, output and employment are independent of the real wage. However, starting from general market clearing, deviations from the general-market-clearing real wage in either direction reduce output and employment. The New Keynesian Model, which also relies on sticky prices, amounts to an extension of the general-excess-supply case of the Old Keynesian Model. The New Keynesian Model assumes that quantities are always demand determined, but this assumption is tenable only under general excess supply. A promising alternative to the non-price rationing of quantities in the Old Keynesian Model is a setup with search-and-matching frictions in the markets for goods and labor.
33850.zh_abstract: 20世纪70年代的文章将一般非均衡框架应用于名义价格和工资粘性条件下的产出与就业决定。数量由商品市场和劳动力市场的短边决定，并涉及非价格配给。在价格和工资“过高”的一般超额供给情况下，产出和就业由基于边际消费倾向的凯恩斯需求乘数决定。在价格和工资“过低”的一般超额需求情况下，产出和就业由基于边际工作倾向的供给乘数决定。在这两种情况下，产出和就业与实际工资无关。然而，从一般市场出清出发，实际工资向任一方向偏离一般市场出清水平都会减少产出和就业。同样依赖价格粘性的新凯恩斯主义模型，相当于旧凯恩斯主义模型一般超额供给情况的扩展。新凯恩斯主义模型假设数量总是由需求决定，但这一假设仅在一般超额供给下才成立。旧凯恩斯主义模型中数量非价格配给的一个有前景的替代方案，是在商品和劳动力市场中引入搜索与匹配摩擦的设定。

33849.title: Spillovers from Public Health Policies in Schools: Evidence from COVID Mask Mandates
33849.zh_title: 学校公共卫生政策的溢出效应：来自新冠口罩强制令的证据
33849.authors: Matthew A. Guzman, Scott A. Imberman, Neil R. Filosa, Tara Kilbride, Nat Malkus
33849.abstract: Schools have long played a frontline role in efforts to contain infectious diseases and prevent spread to the wider community. These include vaccination requirements, school closures during periods of high illness, and the implementation of non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPI) during outbreaks. In this paper we investigate the impact of mask mandates in schools on COVID spread. We use event study and difference-in-differences models that exploit the removal of mask mandates in districts serving 50% of public school students in the U.S. surrounding the revocation of CDC guidance recommending school masking in February and early March of 2022. We estimate that going from 0% to 100% mandated masking in a county reduces COVID deaths by 0.57 per 100k people. We further estimate that the removal of mandates during this time contributed to 21800 COVID deaths through the rest of 2022, 9% of the U.S. total that year. Due to the fact that COVID deaths among students and, to a lesser extent, school staff were rare in the U.S. given school age profiles, we argue that the bulk of these deaths were from spillovers to residents in the wider community.
33849.zh_abstract: 长期以来，学校在遏制传染病并防止其向更广泛社区传播的努力中一直扮演着前线角色。这包括疫苗接种要求、疾病高发期的学校关闭，以及疫情期间非药物干预措施的实施。在本文中，我们研究了学校口罩强制令对新冠传播的影响。我们利用事件研究和双重差分模型，这些模型利用了2022年2月和3月初美国疾病控制与预防中心撤销建议学校佩戴口罩的指南前后，覆盖美国50%公立学校学生的学区取消口罩强制令的情况。我们估计，在一个县内，口罩强制令覆盖率从0%增加到100%，可使每10万人中的新冠死亡人数减少0.57人。我们进一步估计，在此期间取消口罩强制令，导致2022年剩余时间内新增21800例新冠死亡病例，占当年美国新冠死亡总数的9%。由于在美国，考虑到学生（以及在较小程度上学校教职工）的年龄分布，新冠死亡病例本就罕见，我们认为这些死亡中的大部分是由于对更广泛社区居民的溢出效应所致。

33848.title: Bidding for Talent: A Test of Conduct in a High-Wage Labor Market
33848.zh_title: 人才竞标：高工资劳动力市场行为检验
33848.abstract: We develop a procedure for adjudicating between models of firm wage-setting conduct. Using data from a U.S. job search platform, we propose a methodology to aggregate workers’ choices over menus of jobs into rankings of firms’ non-wage amenities. We use these estimates to formulate a test of conduct based on exclusion restrictions. Oligopsonistic models incorporating strategic interactions between firms and tailoring of wage offers to workers’ outside options are rejected in favor of monopsonistic models featuring near-uniform markdowns. Misspecification has meaningful consequences: our preferred model predicts average markdowns of 19.5%, while others predict average markdowns as large as 26.6%.
33848.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一套程序，用于裁定企业工资设定行为的不同模型。利用来自美国一个求职平台的数据，我们提出了一种方法，将工人对工作菜单的选择汇总为对企业非工资福利的排名。我们利用这些估计值，基于排他性约束构建了一个行为检验。包含企业间战略互动以及根据工人外部选择定制工资报价的寡头垄断模型被拒绝，而支持具有近乎统一加价率的买方垄断模型。模型误设具有重要后果：我们偏好的模型预测平均加价率为19.5%，而其他模型预测的平均加价率高达26.6%。

33847.title: Measuring Self-Reported Well-Being
33847.zh_title: 测量自我报告的幸福感
33847.abstract: What should researchers consider when designing experiments that (also) collect self-reported well-being (SWB) data? Focusing on experiments in economics, we examine the motivation behind SWB-data collection, survey leading past examples, and highlight potential pitfalls and their proposed countermeasures.\nWe offer three main messages and a call to action. First, SWB measures should be handled with caution, especially in experiments. Second, despite their limitations, SWB measures can be used cleverly in the lab to provide evidence on questions that choice data alone cannot answer. Third, when collected, analyzed, and interpreted with appropriate caution, SWB measures can be important policy-evaluation outcomes, complementing the inherently incomplete picture provided by more traditional outcomes.\nWe call on researchers to carefully and thoughtfully collect (a variety of) SWB measures in their online, lab, and field experiments. Such a joint, decentralized effort would also mean that over time, SWB data get explored, accumulated, and, hopefully, better understood.
33847.zh_abstract: 研究人员在设计（也）收集自我报告幸福感数据的实验时，应考虑哪些因素？聚焦于经济学实验，我们审视了收集自我报告幸福感数据的动机，调查了以往的主要例子，并强调了潜在的陷阱及其提出的应对措施。我们提供三个主要信息和一个行动呼吁。首先，自我报告幸福感指标应谨慎对待，尤其是在实验中。其次，尽管存在局限性，自我报告幸福感指标可以在实验室中被巧妙地用于提供仅凭选择数据无法回答的问题的证据。第三，当以适当的谨慎态度收集、分析和解释时，自我报告幸福感指标可以成为重要的政策评估结果，补充传统结果所固有的不完整图景。我们呼吁研究人员在其在线、实验室和实地实验中，仔细且深思熟虑地收集（多种）自我报告幸福感指标。这种联合的、分散的努力也意味着，随着时间的推移，自我报告幸福感数据将得到探索、积累，并有望得到更好的理解。
33847.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EH；JEL：C83, C90, D90, I31

33846.title: What Do People Want?
33846.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, Kristen B. Cooper, Ori Heffetz, Miles S. Kimball, Tushar Kundu
33846.abstract: We elicited over a million stated preference choices over 126 dimensions or “aspects” of well-being from a sample of 3,358 respondents on Amazon’s Mechanical Turk (MTurk). Our surveys also collected self-reported well-being (SWB) questions about respondents’ current levels of the aspects of well-being. From the stated preference data, we estimate relative log marginal utilities per point on our 0-100 response scale for each aspect. We validate these estimates by comparing them to alternative methods for estimating preferences. Our findings provide empirical evidence that both complements and challenges philosophical perspectives on human desires and values. Our results support Aristotelian notions of eudaimonia through family relationships and Maslow’s emphasis on basic security needs, yet also suggest that contemporary theories of well-being may overemphasize abstract concepts such as happiness and life satisfaction, while undervaluing concrete aspects such as family well-being, financial security, and health, that respondents place the highest marginal utilities on. We document substantial heterogeneity in preferences across respondents within (but not between) demographic groups, with current SWB levels explaining a significant portion of the variation.
33846.zh_abstract: 我们从亚马逊土耳其机器人平台上的3358名受访者样本中，收集了超过一百万条关于126个幸福感维度或“方面”的陈述性偏好选择。我们的调查还收集了关于受访者当前幸福感各方面水平的自我报告幸福感问题。根据陈述性偏好数据，我们估计了每个方面在我们0-100响应量表上每一点的相对对数边际效用。我们通过将这些估计值与估计偏好的替代方法进行比较来验证它们。我们的发现提供了实证证据，既补充又挑战了关于人类欲望和价值观的哲学观点。我们的结果支持亚里士多德关于通过家庭关系实现幸福（eudaimonia）的概念以及马斯洛对基本安全需求的强调，但也表明当代幸福感理论可能过度强调幸福和生活满意度等抽象概念，而低估了受访者赋予最高边际效用的具体方面，如家庭福祉、财务安全和健康。我们记录了受访者之间在人口群体内部（而非群体之间）偏好的显著异质性，当前的自我报告幸福感水平解释了这种变异的重要部分。
33846.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D12, D90, I31

33845.title: Exchange Rates and Monetary Stabilization of Tariff Shocks
33845.zh_title: 汇率与关税冲击的货币稳定化
33845.abstract: Home currency appreciation can neutralize the relative price distortions created by a tariff, moderating the rise in home import prices. A combination of domestic and foreign monetary policy appropriately managing the exchange rate can thus improve the trade-off between the objectives of supporting domestic demand and containing inflation. Using a New Keynesian two-country model, we analyze the role of the exchange rate in the optimal stabilization of unilateral home tariff shocks hitting, respectively, differentiated sticky-price goods and non-differentiated flexible price goods. In response to a tariff on the former, the cooperative Ramsey optimal monetary policy prescribes home appreciation, implemented mainly through a robust foreign monetary expansion. The monetary response in the home (tariff-imposing) country may be expansionary or contractionary, depending on trade elasticities, but it tends to be modest. If tariffs instead are imposed on flexible-price goods (commodities), the Ramsey optimal monetary response is the opposite, calling for a robust home monetary expansion containing home currency appreciation.
33845.zh_abstract: 本币升值可以抵消关税造成的相对价格扭曲，从而减缓本国进口价格的上涨。因此，通过国内外货币政策适当组合来管理汇率，可以改善支持国内需求和遏制通胀这两个目标之间的权衡。利用新凯恩斯两国模型，我们分析了汇率在分别冲击差异化粘性价格商品和非差异化弹性价格商品的单边本国关税冲击的最优稳定化中的作用。作为对前者关税的回应，合作性的拉姆齐最优货币政策规定本币升值，主要通过强劲的外国货币扩张来实现。本国（征收关税的）国家的货币反应可能是扩张性的也可能是收缩性的，取决于贸易弹性，但往往较为温和。如果关税是针对弹性价格商品（大宗商品）征收的，则拉姆齐最优货币反应相反，要求强劲的本国货币扩张以遏制本币升值。

33844.title: The Effect of a Monthly Unconditional Cash Transfer on Children’s Development at Four Years of Age: A Randomized Controlled Trial in the U.S.
33844.zh_title: 每月无条件现金转移对四岁儿童发展的影响：美国一项随机对照试验
33844.authors: Kimberly Noble, Katherine Magnuson, Greg Duncan, Lisa A. Gennetian, Hirokazu Yoshikawa, Nathan A. Fox, Sarah Halpern-Meekin, Sonya Troller-Renfree, Sangdo Han, Shannon Egan-Dailey, Timothy D. Nelson, Jennifer Mize Nelson, Sarah Black, Michael Georgieff, Debra Karhson
33844.abstract: Developmental differences between children growing up in poverty and their higher-income peers are frequently reported. However, the extent to which such differences are caused by differences in family income is unclear. To study the causal role of income on children’s development, the Baby’s First Years randomized control trial provided families with monthly unconditional cash transfers. One thousand racially and ethnically diverse mothers with incomes below the U.S. federal poverty line were recruited from postpartum wards in 2018-19, and randomized to receive either $\$333$/month or $\$20$/month for the first several years of their children’s lives. After the first four years of the intervention (n=891), we find no statistically significant impacts of the cash transfers on four preregistered primary outcomes (language, executive function, social-emotional problems, and high-frequency brain activity) nor on three secondary outcomes (visual processing/spatial perception, pre-literacy, maternal reports of developmental diagnoses). Possible explanations for these results are discussed.
33844.zh_abstract: 贫困家庭儿童与高收入家庭儿童之间的发展差异经常被报道。然而，这种差异在多大程度上是由家庭收入差异造成的尚不清楚。为了研究收入对儿童发展的因果作用，“婴儿的第一年”随机对照试验为家庭提供了每月无条件现金转移。研究从2018-19年产后病房招募了1000名收入低于美国联邦贫困线的种族和民族多样化的母亲，并随机分配她们在孩子出生后的头几年每月获得333美元或20美元。在干预实施四年后（样本量n=891），我们发现现金转移对四个预先登记的主要结果（语言、执行功能、社会情感问题和高频脑活动）以及三个次要结果（视觉处理/空间感知、读写前技能、母亲报告的发育诊断）均无统计学显著影响。本文讨论了这些结果的可能解释。

33843.title: Meaning At Work
33843.authors: Nava Ashraf, Oriana Bandiera, Virginia Minni, Luigi Zingales
33843.abstract: We evaluate a firm’s unusual, worker-centered, solution to the agency problem: enabling employees to reduce the cost of effort rather than pushing them with performance rewards. We randomize the roll-out of the firm’s “Discover Your Purpose” intervention among 2,976 white-collar employees and evaluate their outcomes over two years. We find that performance increases because the low performers either leave the firm or improve in their current jobs. The trade-off between meaning and pay flattens as those with low meaning and high pay leave the firm. Treatment also reshapes stated priorities and reduces gender gaps in preferences and behaviors, including uptake of parental leave. A cost-benefit analysis reveals high returns that are shared between the firm and the employees through higher bonuses. Finally, we show that observational data obscure these gains, causing firms to underestimate the intervention’s true value.
33843.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一家公司在代理问题上采取的独特、以员工为中心的解决方案：让员工能够降低努力成本，而不是用绩效奖励来推动他们。我们在2976名白领员工中随机推广了该公司的“发现你的目标”干预措施，并评估了他们两年内的结果。我们发现绩效提升是因为低绩效员工要么离开公司，要么在当前岗位上有所改进。意义与薪酬之间的权衡变得平坦，因为那些意义感低但薪酬高的员工离开了公司。干预措施还重塑了员工陈述的优先事项，并减少了偏好和行为上的性别差距，包括育儿假的接受情况。成本效益分析显示，通过更高的奖金，公司和员工共享了高回报。最后，我们表明观察性数据掩盖了这些收益，导致公司低估了干预措施的真实价值。

33842.title: Martyrs, Morale, and Militarism: The Political Impact of Devastation and Slaughter
33842.zh_title: 烈士、士气与军国主义：毁灭与屠杀的政治影响
33842.authors: Shizuka Inoue, David E. Weinstein, Atsushi Yamagishi
33842.abstract: Opinion is sharply divided about whether the bombing of an enemy’s civilian targets and the killing of their combatants result in an adversary’s population becoming pacifist or pro-military. Identification is difficult because natural experiments are rare, and effects may be heterogeneous. For example, killing enemy combatants may create martyrs, while targeting civilians may lower their pro-war morale. We solve this problem by leveraging a natural experiment in Japan in which military casualties and urban destruction varied exogenously, but differentially, across cities. We then estimate the impact of devastation and slaughter on support for Japan’s Liberal Democratic Party, which aims to revise Japan’s constitution to enable it to rearm. We find contrasting effects of targeting soldiers and civilians—military deaths induce future pro-military voting, while urban destruction induces pacifist voting. Moreover, these effects persist long after most people with direct experience of the war have died.
33842.zh_abstract: 关于轰炸敌方平民目标以及杀伤敌方战斗人员是否会导致敌方民众变得反战或亲军，意见存在严重分歧。由于自然实验罕见且效应可能具有异质性，识别这一问题十分困难。例如，杀伤敌方战斗人员可能制造烈士，而针对平民则可能降低其好战士气。我们利用日本的一个自然实验解决了这个问题，在该实验中，军事伤亡和城市破坏在不同城市之间是外生的但存在差异。然后，我们估计了毁灭与屠杀对支持日本自民党（该党旨在修改日本宪法以实现重新武装）的影响。我们发现，针对士兵和平民的目标产生了截然不同的效果——军事死亡诱导了未来的亲军投票，而城市破坏则诱导了反战投票。此外，这些效应在大多数有战争直接经历的人去世后仍长期持续。

33841.title: Conditioning Out the Poor? Consumption Inequality and the Design of Cash Transfer Programs
33841.zh_title: 条件排除穷人？消费不平等与现金转移项目的设计
33841.authors: Santosh Anagol, Thomas Fujiwara, Martin Navarrete
33841.abstract: Conditionality can exclude poor households from receiving transfers. Reanalyzing five randomized evaluations of conditional cash transfers (CCTs), we find that 9–37% of eligible recipients fail to meet conditions, and they typically have lower baseline consumption. We assess the welfare implications of budget-neutral shifts from CCTs to unconditional cash transfers. Conditionality exacerbating inequality among eligible recipients can be quantitatively important for welfare impacts. We quantify how large conditionality-induced human capital gains must be for the welfare benefits of CCTs to outweigh the inequality costs generated by conditionality.
33841.zh_abstract: 条件性可能将贫困家庭排除在转移支付之外。重新分析五项有条件现金转移（CCT）的随机评估，我们发现9%至37%的合格受助者未能满足条件，且他们通常具有较低的基线消费水平。我们评估了从CCT向无条件现金转移进行预算中性转变的福利影响。条件性加剧合格受助者之间的不平等，这对福利影响在数量上可能很重要。我们量化了条件性所带来的人力资本收益必须有多大，才能使CCT的福利收益超过条件性所产生的平等成本。

33840.title: Global Price Shocks and International Monetary Coordination
33840.zh_title: 全球价格冲击与国际货币协调
33840.authors: Veronica Guerrieri, Guido Lorenzoni, Iván Werning
33840.abstract: Individual central banks respond to global supply shocks that transmit inflationary pressures—such as oil prices, shipping costs, and bottlenecks in global supply chains—taking these conditions as given. However, their combined global response determines global demand and, thus, the resulting global price pressure. This paper builds a simple monetary open economy model to explore the economic implications of this channel. We show that, following a negative world supply shock, uncoordinated monetary policy may be excessively loose. Our mechanism for this “expansionary bias” applies to an aggregate shock in a symmetric world economy of small open economies having no individual control over their terms of trade. In these ways, it is distinct from asymmetric shocks and terms-of-trade manipulation motives emphasized in the monetary coordination literature.
33840.zh_abstract: 各中央银行在应对传递通胀压力的全球供给冲击（如油价、航运成本和全球供应链瓶颈）时，将这些条件视为既定。然而，它们联合起来的全球反应决定了全球需求，从而决定了由此产生的全球价格压力。本文构建了一个简单的货币开放经济模型，以探讨这一渠道的经济含义。我们表明，在负向世界供给冲击之后，不协调的货币政策可能过于宽松。我们这种“扩张性偏向”的机制适用于对称世界经济中的总冲击，该世界由众多小型开放经济体组成，这些经济体无法单独控制其贸易条件。因此，它与货币协调文献中强调的非对称冲击和贸易条件操纵动机截然不同。

33839.title: The Optimal Macro Tariff
33839.abstract: What is the optimal macroeconomic tariff when trade is imbalanced and the policy objectives go beyond social welfare and also include fiscal revenues, increasing the number of manufacturing jobs, and closing a trade deficit? We study these questions in an environment which allows for long-run bilateral and aggregate trade deficits that reflect the country’s net foreign asset position and differential returns on foreign assets and liabilities (the “exorbitant privilege”). Only in special cases does the optimal tariff emerge as an increasing function of a trade deficit and for reasons unrelated to trade competitiveness. Instead, the planner trades off the conventional benefits of improved terms of trade with the costs from negative valuation effects on the country’s gross financial position. In our model calibrated to the United States, its large external dollar liabilities reduce the optimal tariff three-fold, from 34% to 9%, and act as an effective hedge for its trade partners against a trade war. In contrast to the expenditure switching logic and Lerner symmetry, closing the trade imbalance calls for an appreciation of the dollar to a level that depends solely on the US external financial position, and not on trade shares or trade elasticities, and can be achieved by means of an import tariff or an export subsidy. Alternatively, financial and trade rebalancing may happen if a tariff war results in the loss of privilege and the associated dollar depreciation.
33839.zh_abstract: 当贸易失衡且政策目标超越社会福利，还包括财政收入、增加制造业就业岗位以及缩小贸易逆差时，最优宏观经济关税是什么？我们在一个允许长期双边和总体贸易逆差的环境中研究这些问题，这些逆差反映了该国的净外国资产头寸以及外国资产和负债的差异化回报（“过度特权”）。仅在特殊情况下，最优关税才表现为贸易逆差的递增函数，且原因与贸易竞争力无关。相反，规划者需要在改善贸易条件的传统收益与对该国总金融头寸产生的负面估值效应成本之间进行权衡。在我们针对美国校准的模型中，其庞大的外部美元负债将最优关税降低了三分之二，从34%降至9%，并为其贸易伙伴在贸易战中充当了有效的对冲工具。与支出转换逻辑和勒纳对称性相反，缩小贸易失衡要求美元升值，其水平仅取决于美国的外部金融头寸，而非贸易份额或贸易弹性，并且可以通过进口关税或出口补贴来实现。或者，如果关税战导致特权丧失以及随之而来的美元贬值，金融和贸易再平衡也可能发生。
33839.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：F13, F31, F4

33838.title: The Persistence of Female Political Power in Africa
33838.zh_title: 非洲女性政治权力的持续性
33838.authors: Siwan Anderson, Sophia du Plessis, Sahar Parsa, James A. Robinson
33838.abstract: Research on female political representation has tended to overlook the traditional role of women as leaders across many societies. Our study aims to address this gap by investigating the enduring influence of historical female political leadership on contemporary formal political representation in Africa. We test for this persistence by compiling two original datasets: one detailing female political leadership in precolonial societies and another on current female representation in local elections. Our findings indicate that ethnic groups historically allowing women in leadership roles in politics do tend to have a higher proportion of elected female representatives in today’s formal local political institutions. We also observe that institutional, rather than economic, factors significantly shape the traditional political influence of women. Moreover, in accordance with historical accounts, we uncover evidence of a reversal of female political power due to institutional changes enforced by colonial powers.
33838.zh_abstract: 关于女性政治代表性的研究往往忽视了女性在许多社会中作为领导者的传统角色。我们的研究旨在通过调查历史上女性政治领导力对当代非洲正式政治代表性的持久影响来填补这一空白。我们通过编制两个原始数据集来检验这种持续性：一个详细记录了前殖民社会中的女性政治领导力，另一个则记录了当前地方选举中的女性代表性。我们的研究结果表明，历史上允许女性担任政治领导角色的族群，在当今正式的地方政治机构中，确实倾向于拥有更高比例的女性当选代表。我们还观察到，制度因素而非经济因素显著塑造了女性的传统政治影响力。此外，与历史记载一致，我们发现了由于殖民势力强加的制度变革而导致女性政治权力逆转的证据。

33837.title: News Selection and Household Inflation Expectations
33837.zh_title: 新闻选择与家庭通胀预期
33837.authors: Ryan Chahrour, Adam Hale Shapiro, Daniel Wilson
33837.abstract: We examine how the media's systematic selection of reporting topics influences household responses to inflation news. In a model where households learn about inflation from news coverage, households account for news selection when forming their expectations. Because media are more likely to report on inflation when it is high, the model implies an asymmetric response to news: high-inflation news changes expectations more than low-inflation news. We test this implication using household panel data, and find that exposure to higher-prices news increases inflation expectations by 0.4 percentage point, while exposure to lower-prices news has no significant effect.
33837.zh_abstract: 我们研究了媒体对报道主题的系统性选择如何影响家庭对通胀新闻的反应。在一个家庭从新闻报道中了解通胀的模型中，家庭在形成预期时会考虑新闻选择。由于媒体更可能在通胀高企时报道通胀，该模型意味着对新闻的非对称反应：高通胀新闻比低通胀新闻更能改变预期。我们使用家庭面板数据检验了这一含义，发现接触价格上涨新闻会使通胀预期提高0.4个百分点，而接触价格下跌新闻则没有显著影响。

33836.title: Take the Load Off: Effort and Technology as Determinants of Electricity Demand Response
33836.zh_title: 卸下负担：努力与技术作为电力需求响应的决定因素
33836.authors: Megan R. Bailey, David P. Brown, Blake C. Shaffer, Frank A. Wolak
33836.abstract: As electricity systems transition toward more variable renewable energy, flexible demand has emerged as a critical tool for grid management. Yet a fundamental question remains: Are emerging smart technologies sufficient to unlock demand response, or does human behavior remain the critical barrier? Our field experiment examines this question through a novel approach that individually randomizes peak event timing for each participating household, allowing us to leverage both within- and between-subject variation. We compare the response to “peak events” on electricity consumption for households equipped with three distinct demand response programs: a fully automated system requiring no action; app-enabled smart devices requiring minimal effort; and traditional manual adjustments. The results are striking—households with passive, automated responses reduced consumption five times more than those required to take any action at all, even when the burden is reduced via smart technology. The provision of enabling technologies alone made no difference in households’ responsiveness, as compared to a fully manual setting, when active participation was still required. These findings reveal that the opportunity cost of time, effort, and attention—not technology limitations—may be the fundamental obstacle to unlocking electricity demand flexibility.
33836.zh_abstract: 随着电力系统向更可变的可再生能源转型，灵活的需求已成为电网管理的关键工具。然而，一个根本性问题依然存在：新兴的智能技术是否足以释放需求响应潜力，还是人类行为仍然是关键障碍？我们的实地实验通过一种新颖方法探讨了这一问题，该方法为每个参与家庭单独随机化高峰事件的时间，使我们能够利用个体内部和个体间的变异。我们比较了配备三种不同需求响应计划的家庭在“高峰事件”中的电力消费响应：无需任何操作的完全自动化系统；需要最少努力的应用程序启用智能设备；以及传统的手动调整。结果令人震惊——与需要采取任何行动（即使通过智能技术减轻了负担）的家庭相比，采用被动、自动化响应的家庭减少了五倍的消费量。当仍需要主动参与时，仅提供赋能技术与完全手动设置相比，在家庭响应性方面没有差异。这些发现表明，时间、努力和注意力的机会成本——而非技术限制——可能是释放电力需求灵活性的根本障碍。

33835.title: Childcare Access and the Allocation of Female Human Capital Across Firms
33835.zh_title: 儿童保育可及性对女性职业和企业绩效的影响
33835.authors: Elena Simintzi, Sheng-Jun Xu, Ting Xu
33835.abstract: We study the effects of government-subsidized childcare on women's careers and firm outcomes using linked tax filing data. Exploiting cohort-level variation in childcare access based on a Quebec universal childcare reform, we show that earlier access to childcare not only increases new mothers' employment and earnings, but also prompts them to reallocate careers to firms previously unattractive to new mothers. These firms subsequently benefited from the reform, drawing more young, productive female workers and experiencing better performance. Our results suggest that childcare frictions hamper women's career progression and the allocation of human capital in the labor market.
33835.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的税务申报数据，研究了政府补贴的儿童保育对女性职业和企业结果的影响。基于魁北克省一项普及儿童保育改革所导致的儿童保育可及性的队列层面变异，我们表明，更早获得儿童保育不仅增加了新母亲的就业和收入，还促使她们将职业重新分配到以前对新母亲缺乏吸引力的企业。这些企业随后从改革中受益，吸引了更多年轻、有生产力的女性工人，并表现出更好的绩效。我们的结果表明，儿童保育摩擦阻碍了女性的职业发展以及劳动力市场中人力资本的配置。
33835.meta: Programs：CF, CH, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G30, G38, J13, J16, J2, J6, M5

33834.title: Policies to Reduce Federal Budget Deficits by Increasing Economic Growth
33834.zh_title: 通过促进经济增长来减少联邦预算赤字的政策
33834.authors: Douglas W. Elmendorf, R. Glenn Hubbard, Zachary Liscow
33834.abstract: Could policy changes boost economic growth enough and at a low enough cost to meaningfully reduce federal budget deficits? We assess seven areas of economic policy: immigration of high-skilled workers, housing regulation, safety net programs, regulation of electricity transmission, government support for research and development, tax policy related to business investment, and permitting of infrastructure construction. We find that growth-enhancing policies almost certainly cannot stabilize federal debt on their own, but that such policies can reduce the explicit tax hikes, spending cuts, or both that are needed to stabilize debt. We also find a dearth of research on the likely impacts of potential growth-enhancing policies and on ways to design such policies to restrain federal debt, and we offer suggestions for ways to build a larger base of evidence.
33834.zh_abstract: 政策变革能否以足够低的成本充分促进经济增长，从而有意义地减少联邦预算赤字？我们评估了七个经济政策领域：高技能工人移民、住房监管、安全网项目、电力传输监管、政府对研发的支持、与商业投资相关的税收政策，以及基础设施建设的许可审批。我们发现，促进增长的政策几乎无法单独稳定联邦债务，但此类政策可以减少稳定债务所需的明确增税、削减支出或两者兼施的规模。我们还发现，关于潜在增长促进政策的可能影响以及如何设计此类政策以限制联邦债务的研究匮乏，并提出了建立更广泛证据基础的建议。
33834.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：D24, E62, H62, I38, J61, O38, Q48, Q58, R38

33833.title: Equilibrium Price Responses to Targeted Student Financial Aid
33833.zh_title: 针对学生财政援助的均衡价格反应
33833.authors: Nano Barahona, Cauê Dobbin, Sebastián Otero
33833.abstract: We study how colleges adjust tuition in response to student financial aid, emphasizing the role of targeting. Our framework highlights two forces: a direct effect that increases tuition, and a composition effect that can reduce tuition when aid targets more price-sensitive students. Using a reform in Brazil’s student loan program, we document both effects empirically and estimate an equilibrium model to evaluate counterfactual policies. We find that merit-based targeting raises tuition by 2.2%, while need-based targeting lowers it by 0.8%, reflecting that lower-income students are more price-sensitive. These price effects have a strong impact on enrollment decisions.
33833.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大学如何根据学生财政援助调整学费，强调了针对性的作用。我们的框架突出了两种力量：一种直接效应会提高学费，另一种构成效应则可能在援助针对价格敏感度更高的学生时降低学费。利用巴西学生贷款计划的一项改革，我们实证记录了这两种效应，并估计了一个均衡模型以评估反事实政策。我们发现，基于成绩的针对性使学费上涨了2.2%，而基于需求的针对性则使学费降低了0.8%，这反映出低收入学生对价格更为敏感。这些价格效应对入学决策有强烈影响。
33833.meta: Programs：ED, IO, PE；JEL：H22, H52, I22, I23, I24, L10

33832.title: A Double Dose of Reform: Insurance and Centralized Negotiation in Drug Markets
33832.zh_title: 双重改革：药品市场中的保险与集中谈判
33832.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Ashley T. Swanson, Tianli Xia
33832.abstract: Making innovative drugs affordable and accessible is a pressing global challenge. Centralized negotiation is an increasingly popular policy solution, but it remains understudied despite wide variation in implementation. This paper studies China’s ongoing National Reimbursement Drug List (NRDL) Reform, which combines centralized drug price negotiation with expanded insurance coverage. The reform reduced retail prices by 48% and out-of-pocket costs by 80%, and increased drug utilization by 350%. At the same time, the insurance design was regressive, and 25% of negotiations failed. Focusing on cancer drugs, we estimate a flexible demand and supply model that features heterogeneous households, bargaining with potential breakdowns, and a government objective function that depends on consumer surplus and insurance spending. We estimate that including innovative cancer drugs in the NRDL generated Y40 billion ($\$5.6$ billion) in annual consumer surplus gains and increased survival by 900,000 life-years among Chinese cancer patients each year. Among the counterfactual policies we examined, centralized market-access negotiation with an optimal coinsurance schedule raises social surplus by 19% relative to the observed policy and achieves 90% of the social surplus of an efficient benchmark.
33832.zh_abstract: 使创新药物可负担且可及是一个紧迫的全球性挑战。集中谈判是一种日益流行的政策解决方案，但尽管实施方式差异很大，它仍未得到充分研究。本文研究了中国正在进行的国家医保药品目录（NRDL）改革，该改革将集中药品价格谈判与扩大保险覆盖范围相结合。改革使零售价格降低了48%，自付费用降低了80%，并增加了350%的药品使用量。与此同时，保险设计是累退的，并且25%的谈判失败。聚焦于抗癌药物，我们估计了一个灵活的需求和供给模型，该模型包含异质性家庭、可能破裂的谈判，以及一个依赖于消费者剩余和保险支出的政府目标函数。我们估计，将创新抗癌药物纳入NRDL每年为中国癌症患者带来了400亿元人民币（56亿美元）的消费者剩余收益，并每年增加了90万生命年的生存期。在我们考察的反事实政策中，采用最优共付率表的集中市场准入谈判相对于观察到的政策将社会剩余提高了19%，并达到了有效基准社会剩余的90%。

33831.title: Consumer Sentiment Towards Asians in the Early Days of the Covid-19 Pandemic
33831.zh_title: 新冠疫情初期对亚洲人的消费者情绪
33831.authors: Kerwin Kofi Charles, Jonathan Guryan, Kyung H. Park
33831.abstract: We revisit the early months of the Covid-19 pandemic to examine whether restaurant foot traffic reveals changes in sentiment towards ethnic groups. Our findings show reduced demand for dining at Asian restaurants located inside Asian enclaves, while outside enclaves, the decline in visits to Asian restaurants was comparable to non-Asian restaurants. In contrast, Italian restaurant enclaves did not experience similar declines in foot traffic after news of the outbreak in Italy and the first U.S. case linked to travel to Italy. We also find suggestive evidence that the shift in consumption was associated with elevated negative sentiment towards Asians rather than efforts to avoid exposure to international travelers.
33831.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了新冠疫情的最初几个月，以考察餐厅客流量是否揭示了针对不同族裔群体的情绪变化。我们的研究结果显示，位于亚洲人聚居区内的亚洲餐厅的用餐需求有所下降，而在聚居区外，亚洲餐厅的访问量下降与非亚洲餐厅相当。相比之下，在意大利疫情爆发以及美国首例与意大利旅行相关的病例报道后，意大利餐厅聚居区并未经历类似的客流量下降。我们还发现了暗示性证据，表明消费转变与对亚洲人负面情绪升高相关，而非避免接触国际旅行者的努力。
33831.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I18, J14, J71

33830.title: No Country for Dying Firms: Evidence from India
33830.zh_title: 没有垂死企业容身之地：来自印度的证据
33830.authors: Shoumitro Chatterjee, Kala Krishna, Kalyani Padmakumar, Yingyan Zhao
33830.abstract: This paper identifies exit barriers as a new reason for India’s underdeveloped manufacturing sector. These barriers not only deter entry but also trap resources in unproductive firms. We document that Indian institutions generate such barriers and provide causal evidence of their effects. Using a dynamic model that separately identifies direct exit barriers from labor and capital adjustment costs, we find that exit barriers are quantitatively significant, particularly in low-performing states and labor-intensive industries. Our analysis yields three findings. First, reducing firing costs raises value added but reduces employment, whereas relaxing direct exit barriers increases both. Second, simultaneous reform of labor firing costs and direct exit barriers yields synergies. Third, sequencing matters: addressing direct exit barriers before labor firing costs preserves employment while improving efficiency. Finally, we show that exit subsidies are more effective at raising value added, while entry subsidies are more effective at increasing employment.
33830.zh_abstract: 本文指出退出壁垒是印度制造业欠发达的一个新原因。这些壁垒不仅阻碍了进入，还将资源困在低生产率企业中。我们记录了印度制度如何产生此类壁垒，并提供了其影响的因果证据。利用一个动态模型，该模型将直接退出壁垒与劳动力和资本调整成本区分开来，我们发现退出壁垒在数量上显著，尤其是在低绩效邦和劳动密集型行业。我们的分析得出三个发现。首先，降低解雇成本提高了增加值但减少了就业，而放松直接退出壁垒则两者都增加。其次，同时改革劳动解雇成本和直接退出壁垒会产生协同效应。第三，顺序很重要：在劳动解雇成本之前解决直接退出壁垒，可以在提高效率的同时保持就业。最后，我们表明，退出补贴在提高增加值方面更有效，而进入补贴在增加就业方面更有效。

33829.title: Valuing Wildfire Smoke Related Mortality Benefits from Climate Mitigation
33829.zh_title: 评估气候减缓带来的野火烟雾相关死亡效益
33829.authors: Minghao Qiu, Christopher W. Callahan, Iván Higuera-Mendieta, Lisa Rennels, Bryan Parthum, Noah S. Diffenbaugh, Marshall Burke
33829.abstract: Human-induced climate change has increased wildfire risks, associated air pollution, and health damages in North America. Despite its large potential for damage, climate-induced wildfire smoke is rarely incorporated in estimates of the societal costs of climate change. We develop an integrated framework to estimate PM₂.₅ from climate-induced wildfire smoke and the associated mortality damage in the U.S. Our framework combines econometric estimates of smoke-mortality relationships, machine learning estimates of climate-smoke relationships, and econometric estimates of negative feedbacks between current and future wildfire activity. We estimate that 3°C of future warming will lead to 46,200 annual deaths associated with smoke pollution in the US, doubling estimated mortality from smoke during 2011-2020. For an additional tonne of CO₂ emitted in 2025, we estimate a partial social cost of carbon of $\$15.1$ (95%CI: $\$2.5$-$\$49.3$) due to climate-induced wildfire smoke mortality in the U.S, which doubles current estimates of the U.S. domestic social cost of carbon. We estimate that smoke-related mortality benefits due to projected emissions reductions from the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act are alone equal to 25% of estimated abatement costs associated with the Act.
33829.zh_abstract: 人为气候变化增加了北美地区的野火风险、相关空气污染和健康损害。尽管潜在损害巨大，但气候引发的野火烟雾很少被纳入气候变化社会成本的估算中。我们开发了一个综合框架，用于估算美国气候引发的野火烟雾产生的PM₂.₅及其相关的死亡损害。我们的框架结合了烟雾-死亡关系的计量经济学估计、气候-烟雾关系的机器学习估计，以及当前与未来野火活动之间负反馈的计量经济学估计。我们估计，未来升温3°C将导致美国每年有46,200例与烟雾污染相关的死亡，使2011-2020年期间估计的烟雾死亡人数翻倍。对于2025年每额外排放一吨CO₂，我们估计由于美国气候引发的野火烟雾死亡，部分社会碳成本为15.1美元（95%置信区间：2.5-49.3美元），这使当前美国国内社会碳成本的估计值翻倍。我们估计，仅2022年《通胀削减法案》预计减排带来的烟雾相关死亡效益，就相当于该法案估计减排成本的25%。

33828.title: What are the Costs of Weakening Shareholder Primacy? Evidence from a U.S. Quasi-Natural Experiment
33828.zh_title: 削弱股东至上主义的成本是什么？来自美国准自然实验的证据
33828.authors: Benjamin Bennett, René M. Stulz, Zexi Wang
33828.abstract: We study the economic consequences of weakening shareholder primacy using Nevada Senate Bill 203 as a quasi-natural experiment. A difference-in-differences analysis shows that affected Nevada firms experienced a decline in firm value of more than 4%, as measured by Tobin’s q. Rather than responding with stronger governance to reassure capital providers, affected firms worsen their governance. We document significant real effects through the investment channel: treated firms undertake worse acquisitions and exhibit reduced efficiency in both capital expenditures and R&D spending. Furthermore, weakening shareholder primacy does not improve how stakeholders are treated, as environmental and social performance worsen.
33828.zh_abstract: 我们利用内华达州参议院第203号法案作为准自然实验，研究了削弱股东至上主义的经济后果。双重差分分析表明，受影响的內华达州公司其公司价值（以托宾q衡量）下降了超过4%。受影响的公司并未通过加强治理来安抚资本提供者，反而恶化了其治理水平。我们通过投资渠道记录了显著的实际效应：受处理的公司进行了更差的收购，并且在资本支出和研发支出方面的效率均有所下降。此外，削弱股东至上主义并未改善利益相关者的待遇，因为环境和社会绩效均出现恶化。

33827.title: Government Intervention in the Financial Market
33827.zh_title: 金融市场中的政府干预
33827.abstract: Government intervention in the financial market through its own trading fundamentally changes the market's structure, function, behavior and outcome. We develop a general equilibrium framework to study the impact of government trading on market outcome and investor welfare. We show that with incompleteness and asymmetric information, the market equilibrium is in general sub-optimal and government intervention can improve investor welfare even without any additional information. However, the welfare impact of government intervention is sensitive to its policy design and the economy's structural details. In addition, popular policy goals such as informational efficiency, price stability and market liquidity can have different welfare implications. Performance measures for government trades based on market prices can be misleading since these trades also affect prices and welfare.
