33827.zh_abstract: 政府通过自身交易对金融市场进行干预，从根本上改变了市场的结构、功能、行为和结果。我们构建了一个一般均衡框架来研究政府交易对市场结果和投资者福利的影响。我们证明，在市场不完全和信息不对称的情况下，市场均衡通常是次优的，即使没有额外信息，政府干预也能改善投资者福利。然而，政府干预的福利效应对其政策设计和经济结构细节非常敏感。此外，诸如信息效率、价格稳定和市场流动性等流行政策目标可能具有不同的福利含义。基于市场价格来衡量政府交易绩效的做法可能具有误导性，因为这些交易同时也会影响价格和福利。

33826.title: Invoicing of Japanese Exports and Imports: Analysis of Granular Data by Industry and by Country
33826.zh_title: 日本出口与进口的计价货币：基于行业和国家层面的微观数据分析
33826.authors: Junko Shimizu, Uraku Yoshimoto, Takatoshi Ito, Kiyotaka Sato, Yushi Yoshida, Taiyo Yoshimi
33826.abstract: As a successful competitive research bid to use Japanese customs data, this study calculates the share of trade denomination currency (invoice currency) in Japan's exports and imports by industry and country from individual export and import documents. The results clarify the characteristics of invoice currency choice. The invoice currency share data by industry and country, compiled from customs data, shows each industry's characteristics by country. We confirm that the industry sector of the traded goods plays a role in the choice of invoice currency shares. In addition, we found that invoice currency shares in some industries varied significantly over the sample period from 2014 to 2022. This indicates that heightened geopolitical risks and supply chain restructuring in recent years may affect the choice of invoice currency. We have confirmed a large gap between the average (vs. world) share and the share by individual industry and country. Time-series changes are also remarkable. Our data indicates that the invoice currency shares aggregated in trade with the world do not necessarily reflect changes in invoice currency shares or the actual use of partner country currencies.
33826.zh_abstract: 作为一项成功竞标使用日本海关数据的研究，本研究根据单个进出口单据，计算了日本出口和进口中按行业和国家划分的贸易计价货币（发票货币）份额。结果阐明了发票货币选择的特征。根据海关数据编制的按行业和国家划分的发票货币份额数据，显示了每个行业在不同国家的特征。我们证实，贸易商品的行业部门在发票货币份额的选择中发挥作用。此外，我们发现，在2014年至2022年的样本期内，某些行业的发票货币份额发生了显著变化。这表明，近年来地缘政治风险的加剧和供应链的重组可能影响了发票货币的选择。我们证实了与世界平均份额相比，以及按单个行业和国家划分的份额之间存在巨大差距。时间序列变化也引人注目。我们的数据表明，与全球贸易汇总的发票货币份额并不一定反映发票货币份额的变化或伙伴国货币的实际使用情况。

33825.title: Tradeoffs over Rate Cycles: Activity, Inflation and the Price Level
33825.zh_title: 利率周期中的权衡：经济活动、通胀与价格水平
33825.authors: Kristin Forbes, Jongrim Ha, M. Ayhan Kose
33825.abstract: Central banks often face tradeoffs in how their monetary policy decisions impact economic activity (including employment), inflation and the price level. This paper assesses how these tradeoffs have evolved over time and varied across countries, with a focus on understanding the post-pandemic adjustment. To make these comparisons, we compile a cross-country, historical database of “rate cycles” (i.e., easing and tightening phases for monetary policy) for 24 advanced economies from 1970 through 2024. This allows us to quantify the characteristics of interest rate adjustments and corresponding macroeconomic outcomes and tradeoffs. We also calculate Sacrifice Ratios (output losses per inflation reduction) and document a historically low “sacrifice” during the post-pandemic tightening. This popular measure, however, ignores adjustments in the price level—which increased by more after the pandemic than over the past four decades. A series of regressions and simulations suggest monetary policy (and particularly the timing and aggressiveness of rate hikes) play a meaningful role in explaining these tradeoffs and how adjustments occur during tightening phases. Central bank credibility is the one measure we assess that corresponds to only positive outcomes and no difficult tradeoffs.
33825.zh_abstract: 中央银行在制定货币政策决策时，常常面临如何影响经济活动（包括就业）、通货膨胀和价格水平之间的权衡。本文评估了这些权衡如何随时间演变以及在不同国家间的差异，重点关注理解疫情后的调整。为了进行这些比较，我们编制了一个涵盖24个发达经济体从1970年到2024年的跨国历史“利率周期”（即货币政策的宽松和紧缩阶段）数据库。这使得我们能够量化利率调整的特征以及相应的宏观经济结果和权衡。我们还计算了牺牲率（每降低一单位通胀所损失的产出），并记录了疫情后紧缩期间历史性的低“牺牲”。然而，这一流行指标忽略了价格水平的调整——疫情后价格水平的上涨幅度超过了过去四十年。一系列回归和模拟表明，货币政策（特别是加息的时机和力度）在解释这些权衡以及紧缩阶段如何进行调整方面发挥了重要作用。央行信誉是我们评估的唯一一个仅对应积极结果且不涉及艰难权衡的指标。
33825.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E32, E43, E52, E58, F33, F44, N10

33824.title: The Return to Adaptation in a Changing Climate
33824.zh_title: 气候变化中适应的回报
33824.authors: Harrison Hong, Serena Ng, Jiangmin Xu
33824.abstract: We quantify the economic return to adaptation in a changing climate. Our approach exploits the fact that extreme-weather arrivals are nonhomogeneous: we first estimate each country’s time-varying disaster arrival rate, then test whether per-disaster damage declines when risk is elevated—a key feature of risk-dependent adaptation. We apply this to tropical cyclones across 48 countries over 1980–2019. Indeed, cyclones do significantly less damage when the arrival rate has risen above its historical baseline. The finding survives placebo permutations, lagged-disaster controls, and two-way-fixed-effects critiques. Welfare gains reach several percent of GDP for the most exposed economies and scale sharply under climate projections.
33824.zh_abstract: 我们量化了气候变化中适应的经济回报。我们的方法利用了极端天气事件到达的非齐次性：我们首先估计每个国家随时间变化的灾害到达率，然后检验当风险升高时，每次灾害的损失是否下降——这是风险依赖型适应的一个关键特征。我们将此方法应用于1980年至2019年间48个国家的热带气旋。确实，当气旋到达率高于其历史基线时，气旋造成的损失显著减少。这一发现在安慰剂置换、滞后灾害控制以及双向固定效应批评的检验下依然稳健。对于最易受冲击的经济体，福利收益可达GDP的百分之几，并在气候预测下急剧放大。
33824.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, EEE, EFG；JEL：O1, O40, O47, Q50, Q54, Q56

33823.title: Income and Wealth Inequality in the United States: An Update Including the 2022 Wave
33823.zh_title: 美国的收入与财富不平等：包含2022年波次的更新
33823.abstract: We provide a comprehensive overview of earnings, income and wealth inequality based on the 2022 Survey of Consumer Finances from the United States. We document the current state of inequality and its evolution over the last three decades organizing the data along key demographic dimensions including age, education, and marital status. The 2022 data reveal that wealth remains highly concentrated, with the top 1% holding 35% of total wealth down from a peak of 39% in 2016. This recent decline in wealth concentration—occurring despite rising income inequality—reflects strong housing price appreciation that disproportionately benefited middle-class households. We extend previous analyses with new perspectives on inequality, including: (1) the role of labor market segmentation in generating wealth disparities beyond standard employment categories; (2) differences in wealth accumulation across birth cohorts showing that younger generations accumulate less wealth than their predecessors at comparable ages; (3) disparities associated with family structure, particularly the financial vulnerability of single-parent households; and (4) heterogeneity in self-reported savings motives, with precautionary savings dominating for lower-wealth households while retirement planning and bequests become more prominent at the top of the distribution. These findings enhance our understanding of the multifaceted nature of inequality and offer essential inputs for structural models and policy design.
33823.zh_abstract: 我们基于美国2022年消费者金融调查，对收入、收入和财富不平等进行了全面概述。我们记录了不平等的现状及其在过去三十年间的演变，并按照年龄、教育程度和婚姻状况等关键人口维度对数据进行整理。2022年的数据显示，财富仍然高度集中，最富有的1%人群持有总财富的35%，低于2016年39%的峰值。近期财富集中度的下降——尽管收入不平等在加剧——反映了房价的强劲上涨，这不成比例地惠及了中产阶级家庭。我们通过以下新的不平等视角扩展了先前的分析：（1）劳动力市场分割在产生超出标准就业类别的财富差距中的作用；（2）不同出生队列间财富积累的差异，显示年轻一代在可比年龄积累的财富少于其前辈；（3）与家庭结构相关的差距，特别是单亲家庭的财务脆弱性；（4）自我报告储蓄动机的异质性，其中预防性储蓄在低财富家庭中占主导地位，而退休规划和遗产在财富分布顶端变得更加突出。这些发现增进了我们对不平等多面性的理解，并为结构模型和政策设计提供了必要的输入。

33822.title: Tax Credits and Child Outcomes: Lessons from the U.S., U.K., and Canada
33822.zh_title: 税收抵免与儿童成果：来自美国、英国和加拿大的经验教训
33822.abstract: Over the last several decades, there have been historic shifts in the structure of cash transfer programs in Western, developed countries, including the U.S., Canada, and U.K. For all three of these countries, the turn of the 21st century marked a shift away from unconditional cash transfer programs like traditional cash welfare, towards an emphasis on benefits that encourage or require work. In this paper, I review the evidence on the impact of tax credits on child outcomes, focusing on what is known about child-oriented tax credits in the U.S. (EITC, CTC), the U.K. (WFTC, CTC, WTC), and Canada (Canada Child Tax Benefit (CCTB), National Child Benefit (NCB), and the Canada Child Benefit (CCB). Overwhelmingly, the evidence from these three countries suggests that tax credits have positive impacts on children on a host of different outcomes, including infant birthweight, childhood health and achievement, educational attainment, wages, and poverty in adulthood. While there is a large, growing body of evidence on the impact of these tax credits on children, future work should further investigate the precise mechanisms through which tax credits impact child outcomes, the characteristics of children most impacted by these credits, and the importance the frequency of credits distribution.
33822.zh_abstract: 在过去的几十年里，包括美国、加拿大和英国在内的西方发达国家的现金转移支付项目结构发生了历史性转变。对于这三个国家而言，21世纪初标志着从传统的无条件现金福利项目，转向强调鼓励或要求工作的福利。在本文中，我回顾了关于税收抵免对儿童成果影响的证据，重点关注美国（EITC, CTC）、英国（WFTC, CTC, WTC）和加拿大（加拿大儿童税收福利金（CCTB）、国家儿童福利金（NCB）和加拿大儿童福利金（CCB））以儿童为导向的税收抵免的已知情况。总体而言，来自这三个国家的证据表明，税收抵免对儿童在一系列不同成果上具有积极影响，包括婴儿出生体重、儿童健康和学业成就、教育程度、工资以及成年后的贫困状况。尽管关于这些税收抵免对儿童影响的证据正在大量增长，但未来的研究应进一步探究税收抵免影响儿童成果的确切机制、受这些抵免影响最大的儿童特征，以及抵免发放频率的重要性。

33821.title: Natural Language Processing and Innovation Research
33821.zh_title: 自然语言处理与创新研究
33821.authors: Antonin Bergeaud, Adam B. Jaffe, Dimitris Papanikolaou
33821.abstract: Innovation is central to models in economics, strategy, management, and finance, yet it remains difficult to measure due to its intangible and knowledge-based na ture. Recent advancements in Natural Language Processing offer new methods to analyze textual artifacts, providing empirical insights into previously hard-to-measure aspects of innovation. This paper provides an overview of the current applications of these methods in empirical innovation research, highlights their transformative potential for reshaping how researchers study and quantify innovation, and discusses the critical challenges that accompany their use.
33821.zh_abstract: 创新是经济学、战略、管理和金融学模型的核心，但由于其无形和基于知识的性质，它仍然难以衡量。自然语言处理的最新进展提供了分析文本制品的新方法，为以前难以衡量的创新方面提供了实证见解。本文概述了这些方法在实证创新研究中的当前应用，强调了它们在重塑研究人员研究和量化创新方式方面的变革潜力，并讨论了伴随其使用而来的关键挑战。

33820.title: Entry and Profits in an Aging Economy: The Role of Consumer Inertia
33820.zh_title: 老龄化经济中的进入与利润：消费者惯性的作用
33820.abstract: Over the past four decades, the U.S. economy has seen a decline in the share of young firms alongside a rise in the profit share of GDP. This paper explores how population aging contributes to these twin trends through a demand-side channel. The core hypothesis is that younger households exhibit lower consumer inertia—a tendency to stick with previously chosen products—than older households. As demand shifts toward more inertial consumers, entry becomes harder, incumbents raise markups, and market share tilts toward larger firms. To quantify this mechanism, I develop and calibrate a firm dynamics model with overlapping generations of consumers who differ in their degree of inertia. Using detailed micro data, I show that younger households are significantly less inertial. The model implies that population aging accounts for 20%–30% of the observed decline in young firms and rise in profits. Reduced-form evidence across U.S. states and product categories supports the model’s predictions.
33820.zh_abstract: 过去四十年间，美国经济中年轻企业占比下降，同时利润占GDP比重上升。本文探讨人口老龄化如何通过需求侧渠道促成这两大趋势。核心假设是，年轻家庭比老年家庭表现出更低的消费者惯性——即坚持使用先前选择产品的倾向。随着需求转向惯性更强的消费者，企业进入变得更加困难，在位企业提高加价率，市场份额向大企业倾斜。为量化这一机制，我构建并校准了一个包含不同惯性程度代际重叠消费者的企业动态模型。利用详细的微观数据，我发现年轻家庭的惯性显著更低。模型表明，人口老龄化可以解释观察到的年轻企业下降和利润上升的20%–30%。基于美国各州和产品类别的简化形式证据支持了模型的预测。

33819.title: Advising Job Seekers in Occupations with Poor Prospects: A Field Experiment
33819.zh_title: 为前景不佳职业中的求职者提供建议：一项实地实验
33819.authors: Michèle Belot, Bart K. de Koning, Didier Fouarge, Philipp Kircher, Paul Muller, Sandra Phlippen
33819.abstract: We study the impact of online information provision to unemployed job seekers who are looking for work in occupations in slack markets, i.e. with only few vacancies per job seeker. Job seekers received suggestions about suitable alternative occupations, and how the prospects of these alternatives compare to their current occupation of interest. Some additionally received a link to a motivational video. We evaluate the interventions using a randomized field experiment covering all eligible job seekers registered to search in the target occupations. The vast majority of treated job seekers open the message revealing the alternative suggestions. The motivational video is rarely watched. Effects on unemployed job seekers in structurally poor labor markets are large: their employment, hours of work and labor income all improve by 5% to 6% after 18 months. Additional survey evidence shows that treated job seekers find employment in more diverse occupations.
33819.zh_abstract: 我们研究了向在劳动力市场疲软（即每个求职者对应很少职位空缺）的职业中寻找工作的失业求职者提供在线信息的影响。求职者收到了关于合适替代职业的建议，以及这些替代职业的前景如何与他们当前感兴趣的职业进行比较的信息。部分求职者还额外收到了一个激励视频的链接。我们通过一项随机实地实验评估了这些干预措施，该实验涵盖了所有在目标职业中注册搜索的合格求职者。绝大多数接受处理的求职者打开了包含替代建议的消息。激励视频很少被观看。对结构性劳动力市场疲软中的失业求职者的影响很大：18个月后，他们的就业率、工作时间和劳动收入均提高了5%至6%。额外的调查证据表明，接受处理的求职者在更多样化的职业中找到了工作。

33884.title: Firm Premia and Match Effects in Pay vs. Amenities
33884.zh_title: 薪酬与非薪酬福利中的企业溢价与匹配效应
33884.authors: Anders Humlum, Mette Rasmussen, Evan K. Rose
33884.abstract: This paper develops a new approach to measuring non-wage amenities and compensating differentials in the labor market. Using a survey of 20,000 job movers in Denmark, we elicit workers’ reservation wage to return to their previous jobs. Our sample contains a large, connected network of firms, enabling us to estimate firm-wide premia and match effects in amenity values. Overall, higher-paying firms provide slightly worse non-pay amenities. Although they provide better perks and flexibility, they also come with higher layoff risk, faster work pace, and greater stress. On average, moves to jobs offering 10% higher pay involve a 5% reduction in the value of amenities, with 0.7% attributable to firm-wide tradeoffs and the remainder attributable to match effects in pay and preferences. Using a rich search model, we quantify the role of amenities in labor market inequality while accounting for preference heterogeneity and endogenous mobility. Worse amenities at high-paying firms offset more than half of their wage advantage, and the within-worker variance in pay across firms overstates the variance in utility by 50%.
33884.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种衡量劳动力市场中非工资性福利及补偿性差异的新方法。通过对丹麦2万名换工作者进行问卷调查，我们获取了工人返回原工作岗位所需的保留工资。样本包含一个庞大且相互关联的企业网络，使我们能够估算企业在福利价值方面的整体溢价和匹配效应。总体而言，薪酬较高的企业提供的非工资性福利略差。尽管它们提供更好的额外津贴和灵活性，但也伴随着更高的裁员风险、更快的工作节奏和更大的压力。平均而言，转向薪酬高出10%的工作岗位，其福利价值会降低5%，其中0.7%归因于企业层面的权衡，其余部分则归因于薪酬和偏好方面的匹配效应。通过一个丰富的搜索模型，我们在考虑偏好异质性和内生流动性的同时，量化了福利在劳动力市场不平等中的作用。高薪企业较差的福利抵消了其工资优势的一半以上，而工人在不同企业间薪酬的个体内方差，将效用方差高估了50%。

33883.title: The Culture and Institutions of Confucianism
33883.abstract: This study reviews the culture and institutions of Confucianism and explores their implications for the trajectory of China’s historical development. We trace the origins and evolution of the core elements of Confucianism and synthesize research on its relationship to clan culture, state institutions, and a broad array of societal values. We also highlight promising but underexplored directions for future research. While Confucianism is often invoked to explain China’s absence from the Industrial Revolution and its lack of democratization, we caution against such retrospective determinism. As a multidimensional and abstract tradition, Confucianism likely allows for varied interpretations and institutional adaptations across time and context.
33883.zh_abstract: 本研究回顾了儒家文化的制度内涵，并探讨其对中国历史发展轨迹的影响。我们追溯了儒家核心要素的起源与演变，综合梳理了其与宗族文化、国家制度及广泛社会价值观之间关系的研究。同时，我们指出了未来研究中具有前景但尚未充分探索的方向。尽管儒家思想常被用来解释中国未能参与工业革命以及缺乏民主化进程，但我们对此类回溯性决定论持谨慎态度。作为一种多维且抽象的传统，儒家思想很可能在不同时代和背景下允许多样化的解读和制度适应。
33883.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：N15, O43, P51, Z10, Z13

33882.title: Stablecoin Runs and the Centralization of Arbitrage
33882.zh_title: 稳定币挤兑与套利行为的集中化
33882.authors: Yiming Ma, Yao Zeng, Anthony Lee Zhang
33882.abstract: Stablecoins are cryptoassets which are designed to be pegged to the dollar, but are backed by imperfectly liquid USD assets. We show that stablecoins feature concentrated arbitrage: the largest issuer, Tether, only allows 6 agents in an average month to redeem stablecoins for cash. We argue that issuers' choice of arbitrage concentration reflects a tradeoff: efficient arbitrage improves stablecoin price stability in secondary markets, but amplifies run risks by reducing investors' price impact from selling stablecoins. Our findings imply that policies designed to improve stablecoin price stability may have the unintended consequence of increasing stablecoin run risks.
33882.zh_abstract: 稳定币是一种旨在与美元挂钩的加密资产，但其背后由流动性不完全的美元资产支持。我们发现稳定币存在集中套利现象：最大的发行商Tether平均每月仅允许6个代理人将稳定币兑换为现金。我们认为，发行商对套利集中度的选择反映了一种权衡：高效的套利能改善稳定币在二级市场的价格稳定性，但通过降低投资者出售稳定币的价格冲击，反而放大了挤兑风险。我们的研究结果表明，旨在提高稳定币价格稳定性的政策，可能意外地增加稳定币的挤兑风险。
33882.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G1, G2, G21, G23, G28

33881.title: Using Discrepancies to Correct for False Matches in Historical Linked Data
33881.zh_title: 利用不一致性修正历史链接数据中的错误匹配
33881.abstract: We propose a method to correct estimates from historical linked data for bias arising from type-I error—"false matches." We estimate the rate of false matching from the disagreement rate in characteristics that should agree across the two linked datasets. Combined with an understanding of the empirical patterns arising from false matches, knowledge of this rate enables us to correct for bias from false matches. Our method enables correction of estimates of both population moments and regression coefficients with valid inference. We illustrate the properties of our method via simulation and demonstrate them using linked US census data.
33881.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种方法，用于修正因第一类错误（即“错误匹配”）而导致的历史链接数据估计偏差。我们通过两个链接数据集中本应一致的特征的不一致率来估计错误匹配率。结合对错误匹配所产生经验模式的理解，掌握这一比率使我们能够修正由错误匹配引起的偏差。我们的方法能够修正对总体矩和回归系数的估计，并实现有效的统计推断。我们通过模拟展示了该方法的性质，并利用链接的美国人口普查数据进行了实证验证。
33881.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：C10, C23, C49, C55, C81, C83, J61, J62, N30, N31, N32

33880.title: The Private Value of Innovating for the Government
33880.zh_title: 为政府创新带来的私人价值
33880.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Larisa C. Cioaca, Elia Ferracuti
33880.abstract: We quantify the private returns to government R&D contracts awarded to firms. We present new evidence that R&D contracts not only finance innovation but also embed an implicit government guarantee of noncompetitive future procurement for the winning R&D contractor. We measure its private value by analyzing stock market reactions to news about R&D contract awards. Using all federal R&D contracts awarded to U.S. publicly traded firms from 1984 through 2015, we find that the average private return on an R&D contract is 19 times its maximum potential revenue. However, returns are highly skewed, with only 7.5% of firms receiving at least one top-quartile contract. Private returns are linked to future production contracts, but only for noncompetitive awards to vertically integrated or large firms. These results suggest that a procurement regime bundling R&D and production contracts enhances value for firms with production capability. We develop a conceptual framework to clarify this innovation policy lever.
33880.zh_abstract: 我们量化了授予企业的政府研发合同的私人回报。我们提供了新的证据，表明研发合同不仅资助创新，还隐含了一种政府担保，即获胜的研发承包商将在未来获得非竞争性的采购合同。我们通过分析股票市场对研发合同授予消息的反应来衡量其私人价值。利用1984年至2015年间授予美国上市公司的所有联邦研发合同，我们发现一份研发合同的平均私人回报是其最大潜在收入的19倍。然而，回报高度偏斜，只有7.5%的企业至少获得了一份处于最高四分位数的合同。私人回报与未来的生产合同相关，但这仅适用于授予垂直整合或大型企业的非竞争性合同。这些结果表明，将研发与生产合同捆绑的采购制度，为具备生产能力的企业提升了价值。我们构建了一个概念框架来阐明这一创新政策工具。

33879.title: Expectations and Information Frictions Within Couples: Evidence from a Sequential Survey of Spouses
33879.zh_title: 夫妻间的预期与信息摩擦：来自配偶序贯调查的证据
33879.authors: Adeline L. Delavande, Gizem Koşar, Basit Zafar
33879.abstract: This paper combines descriptive and experimental evidence to examine how expectations align and information flows within couples. Using an online survey of 2,200 middle-aged U.S. married couples, we focus on expectations about Social Security benefits. We first document substantial misalignment: the correlation between spouses’ expectations about a given partner’s benefits is 0.70, below full agreement, and varies systematically with couple characteristics, reaching as low as 0.45 for couples with below-median earnings. To identify causal information spillovers, we implement a randomized information experiment paired with a sequential survey design in which one spouse receives targeted information and the other is surveyed later. Information provided to one spouse partially spills over to the other, with the effect on the untreated spouse about half that on the treated one. Spillovers are larger when communication barriers are low and the information is more valuable. Finally, the information treatment improves conditions for more efficient intra-household decision-making.
33879.zh_abstract: 本文结合描述性和实验性证据，考察夫妻间预期如何协调以及信息如何流动。通过对2200对美国中年已婚夫妇进行在线调查，我们重点关注关于社会保障福利的预期。我们首先记录了显著的预期不一致：配偶双方对某一方福利预期的相关系数为0.70，低于完全一致，并且随夫妻特征系统性地变化，对于收入低于中位数的夫妻，该相关系数低至0.45。为了识别因果性的信息溢出效应，我们实施了一项随机信息实验，并采用序贯调查设计：一方配偶接收特定信息，另一方则在之后接受调查。提供给一方配偶的信息会部分溢出到另一方，对未受信息干预配偶的影响约为对受干预配偶影响的一半。当沟通障碍较低且信息价值更高时，溢出效应更大。最后，信息干预改善了条件，有助于提高家庭内部决策效率。

33878.title: Assessing Maximum Employment: A Flow-Based Approach
33878.zh_title: 评估最大就业：基于劳动力流动的方法
33878.abstract: The Federal Reserve’s dual mandate, to achieve maximum employment and stable prices, requires monitoring a broad range of indicators and carefully evaluating the trade-offs between these goals. We propose a flow-based framework to evaluate real-time shortfalls from maximum employment, focusing on unemployment and participation cycles. This approach highlights that employment stability—driven by improved job-finding and reduced job-loss rates—is the primary factor behind procyclicality of participation, rather than labor force entry. Moreover, we show that cyclical recoveries in participation are bound to lag those in unemployment—even during fast recoveries. We link unemployment dynamics to price stability by estimating a New Keynesian Phillips curve (NKPC) using data on labor market flows, prices, wages, and inflation expectations. Our findings suggest that the natural rate of unemployment, u*, rose significantly following the pandemic, reflecting declines in job-filling rates, reduced matching efficiency, and a persistent increase in workers' real reservation wages. The model interprets the recent disinflation episode as a soft landing through rising expectations of a weaker labor market coinciding with the FOMC's tightening cycle. This observation emphasizes the forward-looking nature of inflation dynamics.
33878.zh_abstract: 美联储的双重使命——实现最大就业和物价稳定——要求监测广泛的指标并仔细评估这些目标之间的权衡。我们提出了一个基于劳动力流动的框架，用于评估实时情况下与最大就业的差距，重点关注失业和劳动参与率周期。该方法强调，就业稳定性——由改善的求职成功率和降低的失业风险驱动——是劳动参与率顺周期性的主要因素，而非劳动力进入。此外，我们表明，即使在快速复苏期间，劳动参与率的周期性回升也必然滞后于失业率的回升。我们通过使用劳动力流动、价格、工资和通胀预期的数据估计新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线，将失业动态与物价稳定性联系起来。我们的研究结果表明，疫情后自然失业率显著上升，这反映了职位填补率下降、匹配效率降低以及工人实际保留工资的持续增长。该模型将近期的去通胀事件解释为一次软着陆，其机制是劳动力市场疲软预期的上升与联邦公开市场委员会紧缩周期同时发生。这一观察强调了通胀动态的前瞻性特征。

33877.title: Trade and Industrial Policy in Supply Chains: Directed Technological Change in Rare Earths
33877.zh_title: 供应链中的贸易与产业政策：稀土领域的定向技术变革
33877.authors: Laura Alfaro, Harald Fadinger, Jan S. Schymik, Gede Virananda
33877.abstract: Trade and industrial policies restricting critical inputs can inadvertently promote foreign downstream industries via a directed technological response. We provide evidence for this mechanism by examining rare earth elements (REEs) – critical manufacturing inputs with highly concentrated production and low substitutability. We show that China’s REE export restrictions in 2010 induced a surge in global innovation increasing REE input-efficiency and exports in REE-intensive industries. A quantitative trade model with Heckscher-Ohlin-based comparative advantage, directed technological change and input-output linkages rationalizes how input-supply restrictions induce REE-enhancing innovation and expand REE-intensive industries abroad. This directed technological response substantially mitigates foreign welfare losses.
33877.zh_abstract: 限制关键投入品的贸易和产业政策，可能通过定向技术响应，无意中促进外国下游产业的发展。我们通过考察稀土元素——一种生产高度集中且可替代性低的关键制造投入品——为这一机制提供了证据。我们表明，中国2010年对稀土出口的限制，引发了全球创新的激增，提高了稀土投入效率，并增加了稀土密集型产业的出口。一个基于赫克歇尔-俄林比较优势、定向技术变革和投入产出联系的定量贸易模型，解释了投入品供应限制如何诱导稀土增强型创新，并扩大国外稀土密集型产业。这种定向技术响应显著减轻了外国的福利损失。
33877.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, E6, F02, F13, F14, F42, F6, O1, O33, O47

33876.title: America's Housing Supply Problem: The Closing of the Suburban Frontier?
33876.zh_title: 美国的住房供应问题：郊区前沿的关闭？
33876.abstract: Housing prices across much of America have hit historic highs, while less housing is being built. If the U.S. housing stock had expanded at the same rate from 2000-2020 as it did from 1980-2000, there would be 15 million more housing units. This paper analyzes the decline of America’s new housing supply, focusing on large sunbelt markets such as Atlanta, Dallas, Miami and Phoenix that were once building superstars. New housing growth rates have decreased and converged across these and many other metros, and prices have risen most where new supply has fallen the most. A model illustrates that structural estimation of long-term supply elasticity is difficult because variables that make places more attractive are likely to change neighborhood composition, which itself is likely to influence permitting. Our framework also suggests that as barriers to building become more important and heterogeneous across place, the positive connection between building and home prices and the negative connection between building and density will both attenuate. We document both of these trends throughout America’s housing markets. In the sunbelt, these changes manifest as substantially less building in lower density census tracts with higher home prices. America’s suburban frontier appears to be closing.
33876.zh_abstract: 美国大部分地区的房价已创历史新高，而住房建设却在减少。如果美国住房存量在2000年至2020年间以1980年至2000年相同的速度扩张，那么将多出1500万套住房单元。本文分析了美国新房供应下降的原因，重点关注亚特兰大、达拉斯、迈阿密和菲尼克斯等曾经的建设明星——大型阳光地带市场。在这些城市及许多其他大都市，新房增长率已下降并趋同，而新房供应下降最多的地区房价涨幅最大。一个模型表明，长期供应弹性的结构性估计很困难，因为使地方更具吸引力的变量可能会改变社区构成，而社区构成本身又可能影响许可审批。我们的框架还表明，随着建设障碍在不同地区变得更重要且更具异质性，建设与房价之间的正相关关系以及建设与密度之间的负相关关系都将减弱。我们记录了美国住房市场中的这两种趋势。在阳光地带，这些变化表现为在房价较高、密度较低的人口普查区建设大幅减少。美国的郊区前沿似乎正在关闭。

33875.title: Collateral and Secured Debt
33875.abstract: We argue that firms’ assets, especially their tangible assets, serve as collateral restricting both secured and unsecured debt. Secured debt is explicitly collateralized, placing a lien on specific assets, which facilitates enforcement. Unsecured debt is backed by unencumbered assets and thus implicitly collateralized. The explicit collateralization of secured debt entails costs but enables higher leverage. Therefore, financially constrained firms use more secured debt both across and within firms. Our dynamic model is consistent with stylized facts on the relation between secured debt and measures of financial constraints and between leverage and tangible assets, and with evidence from a causal forest.
33875.zh_abstract: 我们认为，企业的资产，尤其是其有形资产，作为抵押品限制了担保债务和无担保债务。担保债务是明确以抵押品担保的，对特定资产设置留置权，这有助于执行。无担保债务由未设押资产支持，因此是隐含的抵押品担保。担保债务的明确抵押担保会产生成本，但能够实现更高的杠杆率。因此，财务受限的企业在跨企业和企业内部都使用更多的担保债务。我们的动态模型与关于担保债务与财务约束指标之间关系、杠杆率与有形资产之间关系的典型事实，以及与来自因果森林的证据是一致的。

33874.title: Why Do Households Save and Work?
33874.authors: Margherita Borella, Mariacristina De Nardi, Fang Yang, Johanna P. Torres Chain
33874.abstract: This paper quantifies why households save and work using a life-cycle model that incorporates wage risk, endogenous labor supply of both spouses, marital transitions, health, medical expenses, mortality, and bequest motives at the death of the first and last household member. We estimate it using PSID and HRS data and conduct counterfactuals to assess the quantitative role of individual mechanisms. Precautionary saving against wage risk is smaller than in models that abstract from labor supply and within-household insurance. Bequest motives and medical expenses remain important drivers of wealth, while marriage and divorce generate large but offsetting effects across household types.
33874.zh_abstract: 本文使用一个生命周期模型来量化家庭储蓄和工作的原因，该模型包含了工资风险、夫妻双方的内生劳动供给、婚姻转变、健康状况、医疗支出、死亡率以及首位和末位家庭成员去世时的遗赠动机。我们使用PSID和HRS数据对其进行估计，并进行反事实分析以评估各个机制的定量作用。针对工资风险的预防性储蓄小于那些忽略劳动供给和家庭内部保险的模型所得到的结果。遗赠动机和医疗支出仍然是财富的重要驱动因素，而婚姻和离婚则在不同家庭类型之间产生了巨大但相互抵消的影响。

33873.title: Social and Health Outcomes around Divorce: Evidence from New Zealand
33873.zh_title: 离婚前后的社会与健康结果：来自新西兰的证据
33873.authors: Kabir Dasgupta, Andrew C. Johnston, Linda Kirkpatrick, Maxim N. Massenkoff, Alexander Plum
33873.abstract: How does family breakdown and divorce affect spouses and their children? We provide new evidence using a matched difference-in-differences design in rich administrative data from New Zealand. While most outcomes remain stable prior to separation, parents' mental health deteriorates in the lead-up. At separation, men's employment falls while women's rises, and women become much more likely to receive government benefits. Men temporarily double their criminal offending; about a third of the increase is domestic disputes. Both parents become more likely to be the victim of non-domestic crime as well. As for mental health, parents become more anxious and depressed at separation, and these remain elevated well after the couple has parted. Their children, too, face increased risks after separation: anxiety, depression, school absenteeism, and crime victimization all rise.
33873.zh_abstract: 家庭破裂和离婚如何影响配偶及其子女？我们利用新西兰丰富的行政数据，采用匹配的双重差分设计提供了新的证据。虽然大多数结果在分居前保持稳定，但父母的心理健康在分居前会恶化。在分居时，男性的就业下降而女性的就业上升，女性领取政府福利的可能性大大增加。男性的犯罪率暂时翻倍；其中约三分之一的增长来自家庭纠纷。父母双方成为非家庭犯罪受害者的可能性也增加了。在心理健康方面，父母在分居时变得更加焦虑和抑郁，并且在夫妻分开后很长一段时间内仍处于较高水平。他们的子女在分居后也面临更大的风险：焦虑、抑郁、逃学和成为犯罪受害者的比例均有所上升。
33873.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I31, J12, J13, J21

33872.title: How Longevity and Health Information Shapes Retirement Advice
33872.zh_title: 寿命与健康信息如何塑造退休建议
33872.abstract: We investigate how advisors’ own health and survival assessments, and information about their advisees’ health and survival probabilities, shape their recommendations regarding retirement spending and investment. Using experiments involving amateur and professional advisors, we show that advisors’ self-assessments have only mild effects on their recommendations, but they do respond differently when provided longevity and health information about their advisees. Moreover, amateur advisors mainly react to simple cues, while professional advisors are more sensitive to client-specific information. While many rely on informal advice from friends or family, amateurs often cannot accurately analyze and utilize key information needed to provide suitable advice.
33872.zh_abstract: 我们研究了顾问自身的健康和生存评估，以及关于其咨询对象的健康和生存概率的信息，如何影响他们关于退休支出和投资的建议。通过涉及业余顾问和专业顾问的实验，我们表明，顾问的自我评估对其建议只有轻微影响，但当他们获得关于咨询对象的寿命和健康信息时，他们的反应确实不同。此外，业余顾问主要对简单的线索做出反应，而专业顾问对客户特定信息更为敏感。尽管许多人依赖来自朋友或家人的非正式建议，但业余顾问通常无法准确分析和利用提供合适建议所需的关键信息。

33871.title: Local Projections or VARs? A Primer for Macroeconomists
33871.zh_title: 局部投影还是VAR？宏观经济学家入门指南
33871.authors: José Luis Montiel Olea, Mikkel Plagborg-Møller, Eric Qian, Christian K. Wolf
33871.abstract: What should applied macroeconomists know about local projection (LP) and vector autoregression (VAR) impulse response estimators? The two methods share the same estimand, but in finite samples lie on opposite ends of a bias-variance trade-off. While the low bias of LPs comes at a quite steep variance cost, this cost must be paid to achieve robust uncertainty assessments. Hence, when the goal is to convey what can be learned about dynamic causal effects from the data, VARs should only be used with long lag lengths, ensuring equivalence with LP. For LP estimation, we provide guidance on selection of lag length and controls, bias correction, and confidence interval construction.
33871.zh_abstract: 应用宏观经济学家应该了解局部投影（LP）和向量自回归（VAR）脉冲响应估计量的哪些内容？这两种方法具有相同的估计目标，但在有限样本中处于偏差-方差权衡的两端。虽然LP的低偏差是以相当高的方差成本为代价的，但必须支付这一成本才能实现稳健的不确定性评估。因此，当目标是传达可以从数据中学到的关于动态因果效应的信息时，VAR只应在使用较长滞后阶数的情况下使用，以确保与LP等价。对于LP估计，我们提供了关于滞后阶数和控制变量选择、偏差校正以及置信区间构建的指导。

33870.title: Why Are Superstar Firms the Best Places to Work? Competitive Advantage in Amenity Provision and the Declining Labor Share
33870.zh_title: 为什么超级明星企业是最好的工作场所？福利供给的竞争优势与劳动份额下降
33870.authors: Ioannis Branikas, Briana Chang, Harrison Hong, Nan Li
33870.abstract: Why are superstar firms the best places to work? We document that worker satisfaction scales nearly twice as fast as wages with firm size. Our assignment model distinguishes selection (talent sorting) from competitive advantage (amenity provision); amenity-cost advantages cause utility to rise more steeply than wages. Using Glassdoor data, competitive advantage explains roughly half of the utility increase with firm size. As workers increasingly value non-pecuniary amenities, superstar firms with a cost advantage substitute wages for amenities, raising profits and reducing the measured labor share all while raising worker utility. Declining labor shares need not signal deteriorating worker welfare.
33870.zh_abstract: 为什么超级明星企业是最好的工作场所？我们记录了员工满意度随企业规模增长的速度几乎是工资增长速度的两倍。我们的分配模型区分了选择（人才分类）和竞争优势（福利供给）；福利-成本优势导致效用比工资增长得更陡峭。利用Glassdoor数据，竞争优势解释了约一半的效用随企业规模的增长。随着工人越来越重视非金钱福利，具有成本优势的超级明星企业用福利替代工资，提高了利润并降低了衡量的劳动份额，同时提高了工人效用。劳动份额下降不一定意味着工人福利恶化。
33870.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G0, G3, G39, J3, J31, J33

33869.title: What Explains Growing Gender and Racial Education Gaps?
33869.zh_title: 是什么解释了日益扩大的性别和种族教育差距？
33869.authors: Zvi Eckstein, Michael P. Keane, Osnat Lifshitz
33869.abstract: In the 1960 cohort, American men and women graduated from college at similar rates, and this was true for Whites, Blacks and Hispanics. But in more recent cohorts, women graduate at much higher rates than men. Gaps between race/ethnic groups have also widened. To understand these patterns, we develop a model of individual and family decision-making where education, labor supply, marriage and fertility are all endogenous. Assuming stable preferences, our model explains changes in education for the ‘60-‘80 cohorts based on three exogenous factors: family background, labor market and marriage market constraints. We find changes in parental background account for 1/4 of the growth in women’s college graduation from the ’60 to ’80 cohort. The marriage market accounts for 1/5 and the labor market explains the rest. Thus, parent education plays an important role in generating social mobility, enabling us to predict future evolution of college graduation rates due to this factor. We predict White women’s graduation rate will plateau, while that of Hispanic and Black women will grow rapidly. But the aggregate graduation rate will grow very slowly due to the increasing Hispanic share of the population.
33869.zh_abstract: 在1960年出生队列中，美国男性和女性的大学毕业率相似，对于白人、黑人和西班牙裔也是如此。但在更近期的队列中，女性的大学毕业率远高于男性。种族/民族群体之间的差距也在扩大。为了理解这些模式，我们建立了一个个人和家庭决策模型，其中教育、劳动供给、婚姻和生育都是内生的。假设偏好稳定，我们的模型基于三个外生因素——家庭背景、劳动力市场和婚姻市场约束——解释了'60至'80队列的教育变化。我们发现，从'60到'80队列，父母背景的变化解释了女性大学毕业率增长的四分之一。婚姻市场解释了五分之一，劳动力市场解释了其余部分。因此，父母教育在产生社会流动性方面发挥着重要作用，使我们能够预测未来因这一因素导致的大学毕业率演变。我们预测白人女性的毕业率将趋于平稳，而西班牙裔和黑人女性的毕业率将快速增长。但由于西班牙裔人口比例不断增加，总体毕业率将增长非常缓慢。
33869.meta: Programs：AG, ED, LS；JEL：D15, J11, J13, J15

33868.title: A Quantitative Theory of Heterogeneous Returns to Wealth
33868.zh_title: 财富回报异质性的定量理论
33868.abstract: Recent empirical evidence documents that different individuals earn systematically different rates of return, even after controlling for portfolio composition. We propose a general equilibrium theory of residual heterogeneity in rates of return on wealth by embedding a financial market with search frictions into a monetary incomplete-market model. We show that the distribution of rates of return offered in the financial market is endogenous and depends on the marginal product of capital, the return on fiat money, and the joint distribution of households across wealth and financial human capital. When calibrated, the model succeeds in reproducing the extent of residual dispersion in returns to wealth across individuals. We use the calibrated model to study various policies and counterfactuals, with a particular focus on monetary policy.
33868.zh_abstract: 近期经验证据表明，即使控制了投资组合构成，不同个体获得的回报率也存在系统性差异。我们通过将存在搜索摩擦的金融市场嵌入货币性不完全市场模型，提出了财富回报率残差异质性的—般均衡理论。我们证明，金融市场提供的回报率分布是内生的，取决于资本边际产出、法定货币回报率以及家庭在财富和金融人力资本上的联合分布。校准后，该模型成功再现了个体间财富回报残差离散程度。我们利用校准模型研究各种政策和反事实情景，特别关注货币政策。

33867.title: Artificial Intelligence and Technological Unemployment
33867.zh_title: 人工智能与技术性失业
33867.abstract: How large is the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on labor productivity and unemployment? This paper introduces a labor-search model of technological unemployment, conceptualizing the generative aspect of AI as a learning-by-using technology. AI capability improves through machine learning from workers and in turn enhances their labor productivity, but eventually displaces workers if wage renegotiation fails. Three distinct equilibria emerge: no AI, some AI with higher unemployment, or unbounded AI with sustained endogenous growth and little impact on employment. By calibrating to the U.S. data, our model predicts more than threefold improvements in productivity in some-AI steady state, alongside a long-run employment loss of 23%, with half this loss occurring over the initial five-year transition. Plausible change in parameter values could lead to global and local indeterminacy. The mechanism highlights the considerable uncertainty of AI's impacts in the presence of labor-market frictions. In the unbounded-AI equilibrium, technological unemployment would not occur. We further show that equilibria are inefficient despite adherence to the Hosios condition. By improving job-finding rate and labor productivity, the optimal subsidy to jobs facing the replacement risk of AI can generate a welfare gain from 26.6% in the short run to over 50% in the long run.
33867.zh_abstract: 人工智能对劳动生产率和失业的影响有多大？本文引入了一个技术性失业的劳动搜索模型，将人工智能的生成性方面概念化为一种边用边学的技术。人工智能能力通过从工人那里进行机器学习而提升，进而提高工人的劳动生产率，但如果工资重新谈判失败，最终会取代工人。出现了三种不同的均衡：无人工智能、存在人工智能但失业率更高、或无限人工智能伴随持续内生增长且对就业影响甚微。通过校准至美国数据，我们的模型预测在存在人工智能的稳态下，生产率提高三倍以上，同时长期就业损失为23%，其中一半损失发生在最初的五年过渡期内。参数值的合理变化可能导致全局和局部不确定性。该机制凸显了在存在劳动力市场摩擦的情况下，人工智能影响的巨大不确定性。在无限人工智能均衡中，技术性失业不会发生。我们进一步证明，尽管遵循Hosios条件，均衡仍是低效的。通过提高工作发现率和劳动生产率，针对面临被人工智能替代风险的工作的最优补贴，可以在短期内产生26.6%的福利收益，长期则超过50%。

33866.title: Collusion through Common Leadership
33866.zh_title: 通过共同领导进行合谋
33866.authors: Alejandro Herrera-Caicedo, Jessica Jeffers, Elena Prager
33866.abstract: This paper studies whether common leadership, defined as two firms sharing executives or board directors, contributes to collusion. Using an explicit measure of labor market collusion from unsealed court evidence, we find that the probability of collusion between two firms increases by 11 percentage points after the onset of common leadership, a ninefold increase over the baseline rate. These results are not driven by closeness of product or labor market competition. Our findings are consistent with the increasing attention toward common leadership under Clayton Act Section 8.
33866.zh_abstract: 本文研究共同领导（即两家公司共享高管或董事会成员）是否有助于合谋。利用来自未密封法庭证据的劳动力市场合谋的明确度量，我们发现，在共同领导开始后，两家公司之间合谋的概率增加了11个百分点，是基准率的九倍。这些结果并非由产品或劳动力市场竞争的接近程度驱动。我们的发现与《克莱顿法案》第8条下对共同领导日益增长的关注相一致。

33865.title: Job Sorting and the Labor Market Effects of a Criminal Record
33865.zh_title: 工作分类与犯罪记录的劳动力市场效应
33865.authors: Randi Hjalmarsson, Matthew J. Lindquist, Louis-Pierre Lepage, Conrad Miller
33865.abstract: We examine the effects of a criminal record on labor market outcomes and the mediating role of job sorting using Swedish register data. Prime-age adults with criminal records earn about 30% less than observably similar adults without records and are concentrated in specific employers and occupations. To estimate the causal effect of a criminal record, we use an event study design that compares outcomes for adults charged with an offense for the first time to matched adults who were suspected of a similar offense but not charged. Acquiring a criminal record reduces months employed by 2% and annual earnings by 5%. These negative effects are: twice as large for more serious or subsequent charges, not driven by job displacement or incapacitation, and not mitigated by automatic record expungement, which typically occurs 5 or 10 years after case disposition. We classify firms by their propensity to hire workers with criminal records, holding suspected offense history fixed. A criminal record reduces employment at firms classified as less likely to hire workers with criminal records, increases employment at other firms, and decreases monthly earnings across all firm types. Firm propensity to hire workers with criminal records varies substantially—even within industries—and is linked to firm size and managers’ prior exposure to people with records. Leveraging manager moves across small firms, we find that when a firm hires a new manager with greater prior exposure to people with criminal records, it hires more people with records, with no detectable effect on productivity.
33865.zh_abstract: 我们利用瑞典登记数据，研究了犯罪记录对劳动力市场结果的影响以及工作分类的中介作用。有犯罪记录的壮年成年人比观察特征相似的无记录成年人收入低约30%，并且集中在特定的雇主和职业中。为了估计犯罪记录的因果效应，我们采用事件研究设计，将首次被指控犯罪的成年人的结果与匹配的因类似罪行被怀疑但未被指控的成年人进行比较。获得犯罪记录使就业月数减少2%，年收入减少5%。这些负面效应：对于更严重或后续指控，其影响加倍；并非由工作置换或失能效应驱动；也不会因通常在案件处理后5年或10年发生的自动记录消除而减轻。我们根据企业雇佣有犯罪记录工人的倾向对其进行分类，同时固定被怀疑的犯罪历史。犯罪记录减少了在被归类为不太可能雇佣有犯罪记录工人的企业中的就业，增加了在其他企业中的就业，并降低了所有类型企业的月收入。企业雇佣有犯罪记录工人的倾向差异很大——即使在行业内部——并且与企业规模以及管理者之前接触有记录人员的经历有关。利用管理者在小型企业间的流动，我们发现，当一家企业雇佣了一位之前接触有犯罪记录人员更多的新管理者时，它会雇佣更多有记录的人，而对生产率没有可检测的影响。
33865.meta: Programs：LE, LS；JEL：J30, J6, J71, K42, M51

33864.title: Climbing the Energy Ladder: How Energy Resources Hinder, Facilitate, and Fuel Economic Growth
33864.zh_title: 攀登能源阶梯：能源资源如何阻碍、促进和推动经济增长
33864.abstract: I show that the nature of the energy resources available to an economy qualitatively determines long-run growth outcomes. A harvested resource such as biomass drags on growth, a mined resource such as coal enables output per capita to hold constant, and both a tapped resource such as oil and a manufactured resource such as solar panels risk degrowth if energy return on energy invested (EROI) cannot stay above a threshold. The only energy resource that can fuel long-run growth is a manufactured resource such as solar panels. Either that resource must rely on substitutable energy inputs that have a sufficiently large EROI, or it must be produced by robots that are themselves produced from robots and energy. Even in these cases, coal and oil economies may have been necessary stages on the way from a biomass economy to a solar economy.
33864.zh_abstract: 我证明，经济体可获得的能源资源的性质在质上决定了长期增长结果。诸如生物质能之类的收获型资源会拖累增长，诸如煤炭之类的开采型资源能使人均产出保持不变，而诸如石油之类的开采型资源和诸如太阳能电池板之类的制造型资源，如果能源投资回报率不能保持在阈值以上，则都存在增长下降的风险。唯一能够推动长期增长的能源资源是诸如太阳能电池板之类的制造型资源。这种资源要么必须依赖具有足够大能源投资回报率的可替代能源投入，要么必须由机器人生产，而这些机器人本身又由机器人和能源生产。即使在这些情况下，煤炭和石油经济可能也是从生物质经济走向太阳能经济的必要阶段。

33863.title: Administrative Fragmentation in Health Care
33863.zh_title: 医疗保健中的行政碎片化
33863.abstract: This paper examines the impact of reducing the administrative fragmentation of billing and payment, one commonly cited cause of inefficiency in US health care. We study a Medicare reform that consolidated billing processes across service types, using its staggered rollout and hospitals’ prior levels of administrative fragmentation for identification. The reform dramatically reduced fragmentation and modestly lowered claim denial rates but had no effect on spending, post-discharge care, or rehospitalizations. It also did not affect administrative costs or technology adoption. These findings suggest that addressing administrative fragmentation alone is unlikely to significantly improve health care efficiency.
33863.zh_abstract: 本文研究了减少账单和支付的行政碎片化（美国医疗保健中一个常被引用的低效率原因）的影响。我们研究了一项整合了不同服务类型账单流程的医疗保险改革，利用其分阶段推出以及医院先前的行政碎片化水平进行识别。该改革显著减少了碎片化，并适度降低了索赔拒绝率，但对支出、出院后护理或再住院没有影响。它也没有影响行政成本或技术采用。这些发现表明，仅解决行政碎片化问题不太可能显著提高医疗保健效率。

33862.title: City Size, Monopsony, and the Employment Effects of Minimum Wages
33862.zh_title: 城市规模、买方垄断与最低工资的就业效应
33862.authors: Priyaranjan Jha, Jyotsana Kala, David Neumark, Antonio Rodriguez-Lopez
33862.abstract: We assess how minimum wage effects on restaurant employment in the U.S. vary with labor market size and monopsony power. Using city-level data, we construct monopsony proxies based on labor flows and concentration. Minimum wages bind less in larger cities, consistent with the urban wage premium, and omitting this relationship overstates how labor market power reduces adverse employment effects of minimum wages. Nonetheless, accounting for city size, lower job market fluidity is linked to weaker negative employment effects, consistent with search models. By contrast, traditional concentration measures do not consistently predict variation in the effects of minimum wages.
33862.zh_abstract: 我们评估了美国最低工资对餐饮业就业的影响如何随劳动力市场规模和买方垄断势力而变化。利用城市层面数据，我们基于劳动力流动和集中度构建了买方垄断代理变量。最低工资在大城市约束力较弱，这与城市工资溢价一致，忽略这种关系会高估劳动力市场势力减少最低工资不利就业效应的程度。尽管如此，在考虑城市规模后，较低的就业市场流动性（job market fluidity）与较弱的负面就业效应相关，这与搜索模型一致。相比之下，传统的集中度指标并不能一致地预测最低工资效应的变化。
33862.meta: Programs：IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：J38, J42, R23

33861.title: The Effects of Switching Electronic Health Record Developer on Specialty Referrals
33861.zh_title: 切换电子健康记录开发商对专科转诊的影响
33861.abstract: We use national physician-pair panel data to examine how switching electronic health record (EHR) developers affects out-of-network referrals from primary care physicians (PCPs) to specialists. We estimate a difference-in-differences model, exploiting changes in EHR developer adoption by physicians’ affiliated hospitals. After a change in the PCP’s EHR developer, referrals to same-developer specialists increase by 5.8%, and referrals to specialists using the PCP’s prior EHR decrease by 4.2%. Referrals to the PCP’s most commonly referred-to specialists are not affected by changes in EHR developer, but shifts in referral patterns are particularly pronounced when the PCP is male and the specialist is female, when the PCP has more experience than the specialist and when the new EHR developer has a majority market share. These results are robust to estimation approaches that account for heterogenous treatment effects and physician selection into hospital systems. Our theoretical model indicates that PCP preferences for convenience may reduce referrals to the highest-quality specialists and lead to EHR market agglomeration, presenting a possible economic rationale for antitrust regulation of information blocking.
33861.zh_abstract: 我们利用全国性的医生配对面板数据，研究切换电子健康记录开发商如何影响从初级保健医生到专科医生的网络外转诊。我们采用双重差分模型，利用医生所属医院在电子健康记录开发商采用上的变化进行识别。在初级保健医生的电子健康记录开发商变更后，向同一开发商专科医生的转诊增加了5.8%，而向使用初级保健医生先前电子健康记录的专科医生的转诊减少了4.2%。向初级保健医生最常转诊的专科医生的转诊不受电子健康记录开发商变化的影响，但当初级保健医生为男性且专科医生为女性、初级保健医生比专科医生更有经验、以及新电子健康记录开发商拥有多数市场份额时，转诊模式的转变尤为明显。这些结果对于考虑异质性处理效应和医生选择进入医院系统的估计方法都是稳健的。我们的理论模型表明，初级保健医生对便利性的偏好可能会减少向最高质量专科医生的转诊，并导致电子健康记录市场集聚，这为信息封锁的反垄断监管提供了可能的经济学依据。

33899.title: Public and Private Transit: Evidence from Lagos
33899.zh_title: 公共与私人交通：来自拉各斯的证据
33899.authors: Daniel Björkegren, Alice Duhaut, Geetika Nagpal, Nick Tsivanidis
33899.abstract: Private minibuses dominate transport in many developing country cities. They serve 62% of trips in Lagos, the largest city in sub-Saharan Africa. We collect panel data to measure how private minibuses respond to the rollout of a new public bus network. When the government enters a route, minibuses depart less frequently, driver profits fall, and drivers switch to connected routes, reducing prices. We develop a custom app to estimate how commuters trade off prices and wait times in an RCT. The private response harms commuters on treated routes, who wait longer, but benefits those on connected routes, who face only lower prices. Overall, 10% of the commuter welfare gains of building the public transit system arise from the response of private transit. Drivers lose welfare equal to half of the commuter gains.
33899.zh_abstract: 在许多发展中国家的城市，私人小巴主导着交通。在撒哈拉以南非洲最大的城市拉各斯，它们服务于62%的出行。我们收集面板数据来衡量私人小巴如何应对新公共巴士网络的推出。当政府进入一条线路时，小巴发车频率降低，司机利润下降，并且司机转向相连线路，从而降低了价格。我们开发了一个定制应用程序，通过随机对照试验（RCT）来估算通勤者如何在价格和等待时间之间进行权衡。私人反应损害了受处理线路上的通勤者，他们等待时间更长，但使相连线路上的通勤者受益，他们只面临更低的价格。总体而言，建设公共交通系统带来的通勤者福利收益中，有10%来自私人交通的响应。司机损失的福利相当于通勤者收益的一半。

33898.title: A Dynamic Theory of Optimal Tariffs
33898.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Andrés Rodríguez-Clare, Andreas Schaab, Stacy Tan
33898.abstract: The classic tariff formula states that the optimal unilateral tariff equals the inverse of the foreign export supply elasticity. We generalize this result and show that an intertemporal tariff formula characterizes the efficient tariff in a large class of dynamic heterogeneous agent (HA) economies with multiple goods. Intertemporal export supply elasticities and relative tariff revenue weights are sufficient statistics for the optimal tariff that decentralizes the efficient allocation. We also develop a general theory of second-best optimal tariffs. In dynamic HA incomplete markets economies, Ramsey optimal tariffs trade off intertemporal terms of trade manipulation against production efficiency, risk-sharing, and redistribution. Intertemporal export supply elasticities and relative tariff revenue weights remain sufficient statistics for the intertemporal terms of trade manipulation motive of second-best optimal tariffs. We apply our results to a quantitative heterogeneous agent New Keynesian (HANK) model with trade.
33898.zh_abstract: 经典的关税公式指出，最优单边关税等于外国出口供给弹性的倒数。我们将这一结果推广，并证明一个跨期关税公式刻画了在包含多种商品的一大类动态异质性主体（HA）经济体中的有效关税。跨期出口供给弹性和相对关税收入权重是分散有效配置的最优关税的充分统计量。我们还发展了一个关于次优最优关税的一般理论。在动态HA不完全市场经济学中，拉姆齐最优关税在跨期贸易条件操纵与生产效率、风险分担和再分配之间进行权衡。跨期出口供给弹性和相对关税收入权重仍然是次优最优关税的跨期贸易条件操纵动机的充分统计量。我们将我们的结果应用于一个包含贸易的定量异质性主体新凯恩斯（HANK）模型。
33898.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, PE；JEL：F13, F41, H21

33897.title: Public Debt Bubbles, Liquidity, and Risk: Policy Assessments Based on the Zero-Beta Interest Rate
33897.zh_title: 公共债务泡沫、流动性与风险：基于零贝塔利率的政策评估
33897.abstract: This paper studies stationary equilibria in a novel class of analytically tractable incomplete markets models with a public debt bubble (meaning that the interest rate r̅ on riskfree government bonds is less than the growth rate). Within the models, the return rᴋ to physical capital can exceed r̅ because capital is exposed to aggregate risk and because it is less liquid than public debt. I follow di Tella et al. (2024), and define r_zero to be the zero-beta interest rate (on an asset with no aggregate risk and the same (il)liquidity properties as physical capital). I provide two distinct sufficient conditions in a zero-growth economy under which the government can increase welfare by following a fiscal policy which induces a higher r̅ . The first case is that r_zero < 0 (which also implies that r̅ < 0). The second case is that r̅ < 0 and r_zero (on average) satisfies the aggregate consumption Euler equation. I argue that the estimates of r_zero in di Tella et al. (2024) are in alignment with this second case.
33897.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一类新颖的、可解析处理的不完全市场模型中的稳态均衡，该模型存在公共债务泡沫（意味着无风险政府债券的利率r̅低于增长率）。在这些模型中，实物资本的回报率rᴋ可能超过r̅，因为资本面临总体风险，并且其流动性低于公共债务。我遵循di Tella等人（2024）的方法，将r_zero定义为零贝塔利率（即一种没有总体风险且与实物资本具有相同（非）流动性特征的资产的利率）。在一个零增长经济体中，我提供了两个不同的充分条件，在这些条件下，政府可以通过实施导致r̅上升的财政政策来提高福利。第一种情况是r_zero < 0（这也意味着r̅ < 0）。第二种情况是r̅ < 0且r_zero（平均而言）满足总消费欧拉方程。我认为di Tella等人（2024）对r_zero的估计与第二种情况一致。

33896.title: On the Measurement of Social Heterogeneity
33896.authors: Klaus Desmet, Ignacio Ortuño-Ortín, Romain Wacziarg
33896.abstract: We discuss a wide range of measures of social heterogeneity, both theoretically and empirically. In our framework, individuals who differ from each other either in terms of their identity traits or of their cultural values experience antagonism toward each other. Depending on the type of interpersonal differences that may give rise to social antagonism, we derive a wide range of microfounded measures of social heterogeneity, many of which have been frequently used in the social sciences to characterize the causes and effects of socially relevant differences between individuals. Using these measures, we explore the worldwide landscape of social heterogeneity. We end our discussion with a consideration of the social, political and economic effects of these various metrics of heterogeneity.
33896.zh_abstract: 我们从理论和实证两方面讨论了一系列广泛的社会异质性度量指标。在我们的框架中，那些在身份特征或文化价值观上彼此不同的个体之间会产生对抗。根据可能引发社会对抗的人际差异类型，我们推导出了多种具有微观基础的社会异质性度量指标，其中许多指标在社会科学中已被频繁用于刻画个体之间社会相关差异的原因和影响。利用这些指标，我们探索了全球社会异质性的格局。我们以对这些不同异质性指标的社会、政治和经济影响的考量来结束我们的讨论。

33894.title: From Tank to Odometer: Winners and Losers from a Gas-to-VMT Tax Shift
33894.zh_title: 从油箱到里程表：从汽油税转向里程税（VMT税）的赢家与输家
33894.authors: Christopher R. Knittel, Gilbert E. Metcalf, Shereein Saraf
33894.abstract: With the increase in fuel economy of the personal transportation fleet along with the increased penetration of hybrid and electric vehicles, federal motor vehicle fuel excise tax revenue has been steadily declining. This has led to calls for finding a replacement for this tax. One option is to replace the gas tax with a vehicle miles traveled (VMT) tax. To investigate the impact of such a tax swap, we combine data from the 2017 National Household Transportation Survey (NHTS) and the American Community Survey (ACS). Using machine learning techniques, we generate estimates of VMT and gasoline tax collections at the census tract level. This allows us to explore the distributional implications of this tax swap at a geographically disaggregated level. We find, as have previous researchers, that this tax swap is modestly progressive. Our more granular geographic analysis highlights striking disparities not previously reported. We find that rural areas and census tracts in the center of the country generally benefit from this tax swap, while urban and bicoastal areas generally experience higher taxation. Additionally, Republican-leaning districts, which overlap significantly with rural areas, see marked gains compared to Democratic districts.
33894.zh_abstract: 随着个人交通车队燃油经济性的提高以及混合动力和电动汽车普及率的增加，联邦机动车燃油消费税收入一直在稳步下降。这引发了寻找该税种替代方案的需求。一种选择是用车辆行驶里程（VMT）税取代汽油税。为了研究这种税收转换的影响，我们结合了2017年全国家庭旅行调查（NHTS）和美国社区调查（ACS）的数据。利用机器学习技术，我们在人口普查区层面生成了VMT和汽油税收入的估计值。这使得我们能够在高度地理细分的层面上探索这种税收转换的分配效应。我们发现，与先前的研究者一样，这种税收转换具有适度的累进性。我们更细粒度的地理分析揭示了此前未曾报道的显著差异。我们发现，农村地区和位于美国中部的人口普查区通常从这种税收转换中受益，而城市和沿海地区通常面临更高的税收。此外，与农村地区高度重叠的倾向共和党的选区，与民主党选区相比，看到了显著的收益。

33893.title: Capability Inversion: The Turing Test Meets Information Design
33893.zh_title: 能力反转：图灵测试遇上信息设计
33893.abstract: This paper analyzes the design of tests to distinguish human from artificial intelligence through the lens of information design. We identify a fundamental asymmetry: while AI systems can strategically underperform to mimic human limitations, they cannot overperform beyond their capabilities. This leads to our main contribution—the concept of capability inversion domains, where AIs fail detection not through inferior performance, but by performing “suspiciously well” when they overestimate human capabilities. We show that if an AI significantly overestimates human ability in even one domain, it cannot reliably pass an optimally designed test. This insight reverses conventional intuition: effective tests should target not what humans do well, but the specific patterns of human imperfection that AIs systematically misunderstand. We identify structural sources of persistent misperception—including the difficulty of learning about failure from successful examples and fundamental differences in embodied experience—that make certain capability inversions exploitable for detection even as AI systems improve.
33893.zh_abstract: 本文通过信息设计的视角分析了区分人类与人工智能的测试设计。我们识别出一个根本性的不对称性：虽然人工智能系统可以策略性地表现不佳以模仿人类的局限性，但它们无法超越自身能力进行过度表现。这引出了我们的主要贡献——能力反转域的概念，在这些领域中，人工智能未能通过检测并非由于表现较差，而是因为当它们高估人类能力时，表现得“好得可疑”。我们证明，如果人工智能在哪怕一个领域显著高估了人类能力，它就无法可靠地通过一个最优设计的测试。这一见解颠覆了传统直觉：有效的测试不应针对人类擅长什么，而应针对人工智能系统性地误解的人类不完美的特定模式。我们识别出持续误解的结构性来源——包括从成功案例中学习失败的困难以及具身经验的根本差异——这些使得某些能力反转即使在人工智能系统改进时也可被利用来进行检测。

33891.title: Basic Income and the Dynamics of Employment and Human Capital in a Non-Urban Disadvantaged Setting
33891.zh_title: 基本收入与非城市弱势环境中的就业和人力资本动态
33891.authors: Jorge Luis García, Patrick L. Warren, L. Reed Watson
33891.abstract: Why and when could basic income inhibit employment? We randomize 200 dollars of basic income per month for two years within a non-urban disadvantaged sample tracked using high-frequency administrative data. The amount provided is 21% of average all-source income. In the short term (0.5 years after baseline), relative to the control group, treatment-group employment decreases by 58%, average all-source income remains constant, and health-investment rates increase. In the longer term (1.25 years after baseline), employment and health-investment rates revert to their control-group counterparts. Treatment participants receive basic income, take time off work, address health needs, and, subsequently, reintegrate into employment.
33891.zh_abstract: 基本收入为何以及何时会抑制就业？我们在一个非城市弱势样本中，随机分配每月200美元的基本收入，为期两年，并使用高频行政数据进行追踪。提供的金额占平均所有来源收入的21%。在短期内（基线后0.5年），相对于对照组，处理组的就业率下降了58%，平均所有来源收入保持不变，健康投资率增加。在长期内（基线后1.25年），就业率和健康投资率恢复到对照组的水平。处理组参与者获得基本收入，休假处理健康需求，随后重新融入就业。
33891.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H20, I12, J01, J08

33890.title: Do Vaping Taxes Tip the Scale? The Effect of E-Cigarette Taxation on Obesity
33890.zh_title: 电子烟税会打破平衡吗？电子烟税收对肥胖的影响
33890.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, Tessie Krishna, Yang Liang, Joseph J. Sabia, Anthony Chuo
33890.abstract: A large literature documents that quitting cigarette smoking may lead to weight gain because nicotine is an appetite suppressant and metabolic stimulant. However, researchers in this literature emphasize that the health benefits of smoking cessation exceed the harms from the weight typically gained. New products, such as electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS), that deliver nicotine with a lower health risk than combustible cigarettes could conceivably alter this tradeoff in favor of nicotine use. Accordingly, this study asks whether a leading policy tool to curb ENDS use – ENDS taxes – has the unintended consequence of causing weight gain. We find that, despite reducing nicotine vaping, ENDS taxes lead to robust reductions in weight and body mass index among female teens. A one-dollar (per mL of e-liquid) increase in the ENDS tax rate (2023$) leads to a 0.8-1.0 percentage-point decline in the probability that a female youth is obese. For male teens and both female and male adults, the estimated impacts are generally smaller and statistically indistinguishable from zero. An investigation of mechanisms reveals possible explanations for the absence of weight gain from ENDS taxes. The first is ENDS-tax-induced substitution to cigarettes, which offsets reductions in nicotine consumption from ENDS. The second is indirect effects on weight-related behaviors, including reductions in alcohol and marijuana use and increased healthier food consumption.
33890.zh_abstract: 大量文献记载，戒烟可能导致体重增加，因为尼古丁是一种食欲抑制剂和代谢刺激剂。然而，该文献的研究人员强调，戒烟的健康益处超过了通常体重增加带来的危害。电子尼古丁输送系统等新产品以比可燃香烟更低的健康风险输送尼古丁，可能改变这种权衡，有利于尼古丁的使用。因此，本研究探讨了限制电子烟使用的主要政策工具——电子烟税——是否会导致体重增加这一意外后果。我们发现，尽管减少了尼古丁电子烟的使用，电子烟税却导致女性青少年体重和身体质量指数显著下降。电子烟税率每增加1美元（每毫升烟油，2023年美元），女性青少年肥胖的概率下降0.8-1.0个百分点。对于男性青少年以及女性和男性成年人，估计的影响通常较小，且在统计上与零无显著差异。对机制的调查揭示了电子烟税未导致体重增加的可能解释。首先是电子烟税诱导向香烟的替代，这抵消了电子烟尼古丁消费的减少。其次是对体重相关行为的间接影响，包括减少酒精和大麻使用以及增加更健康食品的消费。

33889.title: Modifying Monopoly: Negotiated Medicare Drug Price Reductions May Not Increase Access or Use for Most Patients Taking the Targeted Drugs
33889.zh_title: 修改垄断：谈判后的医疗保险药品降价可能不会增加大多数服用目标药物患者的获取或使用
33889.authors: Debra Lederman, Alexander L. Olssen, Mark Pauly
33889.abstract: This paper studies two major changes in the financing of Part D drugs for Medicare due to the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). Effective 2025 it capped out of pocket (OOP) payments at $\$2000$ per year, and effective 2026 it will pay lower prices (negotiated by Medicare) for 10 targeted costly and effective drugs. This paper uses a large representative claims sample to explore the combined effect of these two provisions on the marginal cost sharing that affects beneficiaries’ access to these drugs. While many beneficiaries will be expected to see lower marginal OOP prices, we find that a majority of those using the targeted drugs will face either no change in their marginal OOP or, in a large fraction of cases, an increase in their dollar cost sharing per additional unit of use. This happens even when beneficiaries see reductions in their annual OOP cost because of the nonlinear nature of cost sharing in the Medicare Part D drug.
33889.zh_abstract: 本文研究了《通货膨胀削减法案》导致的医疗保险D部分药品融资的两项重大变化。自2025年起，它将自付费用上限设定为每年2000美元；自2026年起，它将为10种目标昂贵且有效的药物支付更低的价格（由医疗保险谈判确定）。本文使用一个大型代表性索赔样本来探讨这两项规定对影响受益人获取这些药物的边际成本分担的联合效应。虽然预计许多受益人会看到更低的边际自付价格，但我们发现，大多数使用目标药物的人要么面临边际自付费用没有变化，要么在很大比例的情况下，每增加一单位使用量，其美元成本分担增加。即使受益人因医疗保险D部分药品成本分担的非线性性质而看到年度自付成本减少，这种情况也会发生。

33888.title: Inflation Dynamics with a Generalized Lucas Phillips Curve
33888.zh_title: 具有广义卢卡斯菲利普斯曲线的通胀动态
33888.abstract: I investigate a generalized form of the Lucas (1972) Phillips curve, in which firms take varying amounts of time to learn aggregate demand, in standard textbook new-Keynesian models. This Phillips curve helps to reconcile the sharp divergence between the standard model on the one hand and the beliefs of most policy analysts and the available evidence on the other. In the standard model, inflation and output rise after interest rates rise, with only the possibility of a one-time downward jump. With the generalized Lucas Phillips curve, inflation is initially unstable, so a small initial disinflation builds up before turning around. The model preserves the desirable long-run stability and neutrality of the standard model.
33888.zh_abstract: 我在标准教科书式新凯恩斯模型中，研究了卢卡斯（1972）菲利普斯曲线的一种广义形式，其中企业需要不同的时间来了解总需求。这条菲利普斯曲线有助于调和标准模型与大多数政策分析者的信念及现有证据之间的尖锐分歧。在标准模型中，利率上升后通胀和产出上升，只可能有一次性的向下跳跃。而使用广义卢卡斯菲利普斯曲线，通胀最初是不稳定的，因此一个小的初始通缩在逆转之前会先累积起来。该模型保留了标准模型理想的长期稳定性和中性。

33887.title: Trade within Multinational Boundaries
33887.authors: Laura Alfaro, Paola Conconi, Fariha Kamal, Zachary Kroff
33887.abstract: Traditional theories of firm boundaries predict trade between vertically related units of the same firm. Using novel data that combine a comprehensive mapping of U.S. multinationals’ production networks with their customs filings, we uncover a strong positive relationship between input-output linkages and trade between parents and their affiliates. We also find that intrafirm trade is prevalent, particularly between geographically proximate units: three-quarters of affiliates in North America trade with their U.S. parent. These results overturn prior findings based on survey data on intrafirm trade. Administrative intrafirm records enable correcting measurement errors in survey data, reconciling traditional theories with empirical evidence.
33887.zh_abstract: 关于企业边界的传统理论预测了同一企业垂直相关单位之间的贸易。利用结合了美国跨国公司生产网络全面映射与其海关申报单的新数据，我们发现了投入产出关联与母公司和其附属公司之间贸易的强正相关关系。我们还发现公司内部贸易很普遍，尤其是在地理上接近的单位之间：北美四分之三的附属公司与其美国母公司进行贸易。这些结果推翻了基于公司内部贸易调查数据的先前发现。行政性的公司内部记录能够纠正调查数据中的测量误差，使传统理论与经验证据相一致。
33887.meta: Programs：IFM, IO, ITI；JEL：D23, F14, F23, F4, L20

33886.title: Competition and Management Upgrading: Experimental Evidence from Ethiopia
33886.zh_title: 竞争与管理升级：来自埃塞俄比亚的实验证据
33886.authors: Girum Abebe, Stefano Caria, Pascaline Dupas, Marcel Fafchamps, Tigabu Getahun
33886.abstract: We experimentally test two seminal hypotheses on the impact of competition on firms' management upgrading. In a first experiment, we protect firms from labor market competition by reducing the risk that a freshly trained manager would be poached by a rival firm. We find that this protection does not increase firms’ investment in management training. In a second suite of experiments, we boost perceived product market competition by informing firms either that rival firms have received management training or that foreign firms are gaining easier access to the domestic market. Again, we find no evidence that this increases firms’ average willingness to invest in management training. To explain why firms do not feel threatened by competition, we present evidence suggesting that, in contrast to commonly held assumptions, firm managers in our setting hold a mental model of competition that posits positive—instead of negative—spillovers, arising primarily from differentiation.
33886.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验检验了关于竞争对企业管理升级影响的两个开创性假设。在第一个实验中，我们通过降低新培训的管理者被竞争对手挖走的风险，保护企业免受劳动力市场竞争的影响。我们发现这种保护并未增加企业对管理培训的投资。在第二个系列实验中，我们通过告知企业竞争对手已接受管理培训或外国企业更容易进入国内市场，来增强感知的产品市场竞争。同样，我们没有发现证据表明这增加了企业投资管理培训的平均意愿。为了解释为什么企业不感到竞争的威胁，我们提供的证据表明，与普遍假设相反，我们环境中的企业管理者持有一种竞争的心理模型，该模型假设存在正面的——而非负面的——溢出效应，主要源于差异化。

33885.title: Post-Pandemic Global Inflation, Disinflation, and Central Bank Policy Responses: A Review of the Facts, Empirical Findings, and their Implications for Monetary Policy Framework Assessments
33885.zh_title: 疫情后的全球通胀、通缩与央行政策应对：事实、实证发现及其对货币政策框架评估的启示综述
33885.abstract: This paper examines the 2021-2022 global inflation surge and the belated but aggressive monetary policy response to it by advanced economy central banks. Drawing on body of recent empirical research, it identifies three primary drivers of the global inflation surge: supply shocks from pandemic disruptions and Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, accommodative fiscal and monetary policies that responded to the economic dislocation caused by pandemic, and a demand shift toward goods relative to services, that exacerbated supply chain pressures. Advanced economy central banks were initially slow to react but ultimately raised rates aggressively and succeeded, with help from a reversal of the initial supply shocks which contributed to the initial inflation surge, in returning inflation to “2 point something” were confident enough in the prospects for further disinflation to began cutting interest rates by the summer of 2024. The paper explores benefits and costs of proposals to make forward guidance on the policy rate and the balance sheet more robust and considers the benefits and costs of incorporating scenario analysis into the communication toolkit.
33885.zh_abstract: 本文考察了2021-2022年的全球通胀飙升以及发达经济体央行对此迟缓但激进的货币政策应对。基于近期实证研究，本文识别出全球通胀飙升的三个主要驱动因素：来自疫情干扰和俄罗斯入侵乌克兰的供给冲击；应对疫情造成的经济混乱的宽松财政和货币政策；以及需求从服务转向商品，加剧了供应链压力。发达经济体央行最初反应缓慢，但最终激进加息并成功地将通胀恢复到“2点几”的水平，这得益于最初导致通胀飙升的供给冲击的逆转，并且它们对进一步通缩的前景足够有信心，以至于在2024年夏季开始降息。本文探讨了使政策利率和资产负债表的前瞻性指引更加稳健的提案的收益和成本，并考虑了将情景分析纳入沟通工具包的收益和成本。

33895.title: Measuring Industrial Policy: A Text-Based Approach
33895.zh_title: 衡量产业政策：一种基于文本的方法
33895.authors: Réka Juhász, Nathan J. Lane, Emily Oehlsen, Veronica C. Perez
33895.abstract: Since the 18th century, policymakers have debated the merits of industrial policy (IP). Yet, economists lack basic facts about its use due to measurement challenges. We propose a new approach to IP measurement based on information contained in policy text. We show how off-the-shelf supervised machine learning tools can be used to categorize industrial policies at scale. Using this approach, we validate long-standing concerns with earlier measurement approaches that conflate IP with other types of policy. We apply our methodology to a global database of commercial policy descriptions, and provide a first look at IP use at the country, industry, and year levels (2010-2022). The new data on IP suggest that i) IP is on the rise; ii) modern IP tends to use subsidies and export promotion measures as opposed to tariffs; iii) rich countries heavily dominate IP use; iv) IP tends to target sectors with an established comparative advantage, particularly in high-income countries.
33895.zh_abstract: 自18世纪以来，政策制定者一直在争论产业政策（IP）的利弊。然而，由于测量方面的挑战，经济学家缺乏关于其使用的基本事实。我们提出了一种基于政策文本所含信息的产业政策测量新方法。我们展示了如何利用现成的监督式机器学习工具来大规模地对产业政策进行分类。通过这种方法，我们验证了早期测量方法长期存在的担忧，即这些方法将产业政策与其他类型的政策混为一谈。我们将我们的方法应用于一个全球商业政策描述数据库，并首次从国家、行业和年份层面（2010-2022年）审视了产业政策的使用情况。关于产业政策的新数据表明：i) 产业政策正在兴起；ii) 现代产业政策倾向于使用补贴和出口促进措施，而非关税；iii) 富裕国家在产业政策使用中占据主导地位；iv) 产业政策倾向于针对具有既定比较优势的行业，尤其是在高收入国家。
33895.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, POL, PR；JEL：C38, L52, O25

33892.title: AI and Social Media: A Political Economy Perspective
33892.zh_title: 人工智能与社交媒体：一个政治经济学视角
33892.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Asuman Ozdaglar, James Siderius
33892.abstract: We consider the political consequences of the use of artificial intelligence (AI) by online platforms engaged in social media content dissemination, entertainment, or electronic commerce. We identify two distinct but complementary mechanisms, the social media channel and the digital ads channel, which together and separately contribute to the polarization of voters and consequently the polarization of parties. First, AI-driven recommendations aimed at maximizing user engagement on platforms create echo chambers (or “filter bubbles”) that increase the likelihood that individuals are not confronted with counter-attitudinal content. Consequently, social media engagement makes voters more polarized, and then parties respond by becoming more polarized themselves. Second, we show that party competition can encourage platforms to rely more on targeted digital ads for monetization (as opposed to a subscription-based business model), and such ads in turn make the electorate more polarized, further contributing to the polarization of parties. These effects do not arise when one party is dominant, in which case the profit-maximizing business model of the platform is subscription-based. We discuss the impact regulations can have on the polarizing effects of AI-powered online platforms.
33892.zh_abstract: 我们考虑了从事社交媒体内容传播、娱乐或电子商务的在线平台使用人工智能的政治后果。我们识别出两种不同但互补的机制，即社交媒体渠道和数字广告渠道，它们共同且各自地加剧了选民的极化，进而导致政党的极化。首先，旨在最大化平台用户参与度的人工智能驱动推荐创造了回音室（或“过滤气泡”），增加了个人不接触对立态度内容的可能性。因此，社交媒体参与使选民更加极化，然后政党通过自身变得更加极化来回应。其次，我们表明政党竞争可以鼓励平台更多地依赖定向数字广告来实现货币化（相对于基于订阅的商业模式），而这种广告反过来又使选民更加极化，进一步加剧了政党的极化。当一个政党占主导地位时，这些效应不会出现，在这种情况下，平台利润最大化的商业模式是基于订阅的。我们讨论了监管可能对人工智能驱动的在线平台的极化效应产生的影响。
